```{r}

#########################
## Verify file intengrity
#########################

# For every population × chromosome confirm that the prerequisite files exist:
#   1) AlphaImpute2 imputed output: chr{CHR}.genotypes
#   2) Marker map: chr{CHR}_Pop{POP}.markers.snp
#   3) Pedigree: pop{POP}_ped.txt
#   Also:
#     - define REC/DON parent IDs based on population and subgenome (AB vs D)
#     - optionally normalize whitespace in the AI2 .genotypes output

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# =================== EDIT ROOT IF NEEDED ===================
# ROOT directory that contains population folders (Pop30, Pop32, ...) and then AI2 subfolders.
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
# ===========================================================

POPS <- c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80)
CHRS <- c("1A","1B","1D","2A","2B","2D","3A","3B","3D","4A","4B","4D",
          "5A","5B","5D","6A","6B","6D","7A","7B","7D")

# Parent mapping table:
# - REC is recurrent parent label used in AI2 output
# - DON_AB is donor label used for A/B chromosomes
# - DON_D  is donor label used for D chromosomes
pop_map <- data.table::data.table(
  pop    = c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80),
  REC    = c("RP2","RP2","RP2","RP1","RP1","RP1","RP1"),
  DON_AB = c("WE30","WE32","WE34","WE41","WE42","WE46","WE80"),
  DON_D  = c("TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA1")
)

# Toggles
DO_RUN      <- FALSE  # set TRUE to call worker_fun()
NORMALIZE   <- TRUE   # convert whitespace in .genotypes to tabs
STOP_ON_ERR <- FALSE  # if TRUE, stop on first missing prerequisite; else continue

# Utility: subgenome key for parent selection
subkey_for_chr <- function(chr) {
  sg <- substr(chr, nchar(chr), nchar(chr))
  if (sg == "D") "D" else "AB"
}

# Utility: whitespace normalization
normalize_genotypes_file <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(FALSE)
  x <- tryCatch(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  x <- gsub("[[:space:]]+", "\t", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\r", "", x, fixed = TRUE)
  tmp <- paste0(path, ".tmp")
  ok <- tryCatch({ writeLines(x, tmp); TRUE }, error = function(e) FALSE)
  if (!ok) return(FALSE)
  ok2 <- file.rename(tmp, path)
  if (!ok2) unlink(tmp)
  ok2
}

# Validate prerequisites for one pop x chr
validate_context <- function(POP, CHR) {
  chr_tag <- paste0("chr", CHR)
  pop_dir <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2")

  # AI2 genotype output
  geno <- file.path(pop_dir, "runs_pedOnly_l1", chr_tag, paste0(chr_tag, ".genotypes"))

  # Per-pop marker maps
  map_primary  <- file.path(pop_dir, sprintf("%s_Pop%d.markers.snp", chr_tag, POP))
  map_fallback <- file.path(pop_dir, "snp", sprintf("%s_Pop%d.markers.snp", chr_tag, POP))
  mapf <- if (file.exists(map_primary)) map_primary else map_fallback

  # Per-pop pedigree
  ped  <- file.path(pop_dir, sprintf("pop%d_ped.txt", POP))

  subkey  <- subkey_for_chr(CHR)
  parents <- pop_map[pop == POP]
  rec     <- parents$REC
  don     <- if (identical(subkey, "D")) parents$DON_D else parents$DON_AB

  missing <- character(0)
  if (!file.exists(geno)) missing <- c(missing, sprintf("(missing) %s", geno))
  if (!file.exists(mapf)) missing <- c(missing,
                                       sprintf("(missing) %s", map_primary),
                                       sprintf("(missing) %s", map_fallback))
  if (!file.exists(ped))  missing <- c(missing, sprintf("(missing) %s", ped))

  list(
    POP = POP, CHR = CHR, chr_tag = chr_tag,
    pop_dir = pop_dir,
    geno = geno, map = mapf, ped = ped,
    subkey = subkey, subgenome = substr(CHR, nchar(CHR), nchar(CHR)),
    REC = rec, DON = don,
    missing = missing
  )
}

# Placeholder worker
worker_fun <- function(ctx) {
  out_dir  <- file.path(ctx$pop_dir, "runs", ctx$chr_tag)
  bins_out <- file.path(out_dir, sprintf("Pop%d_%s_bins.tsv", ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag))
  message(sprintf("[WORK] Pop%02d %s | REC=%s DON=%s -> would write: %s",
                  ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag, ctx$REC, ctx$DON, bins_out))
  invisible(TRUE)
}

results <- list()
idx <- 0L

for (POP in POPS) {
  for (CHR in CHRS) {
    idx <- idx + 1L
    ctx <- validate_context(POP, CHR)

    message("----------------------------------------------------------------")
    message(sprintf("[READY] Pop%02d %s (subgenome=%s, key=%s)",
                    ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag, ctx$subgenome, ctx$subkey))
    message("  GENO: ", ctx$geno)
    message("   MAP: ", ctx$map)
    message("   PED: ", ctx$ped)
    message(sprintf(" Parents: REC=%s  DON=%s", ctx$REC, ctx$DON))

    # Missing prerequisites handling
    if (length(ctx$missing)) {
      message("[SKIP] Missing prerequisites:\n  - ", paste(ctx$missing, collapse = "\n  - "))
      if (isTRUE(STOP_ON_ERR)) stop("Stopping on first missing prerequisite.")
      results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "missing")
      next
    }

    # Normalize whitespace in AI2 genotypes (optional but recommended)
    if (isTRUE(NORMALIZE)) {
      ok_norm <- normalize_genotypes_file(ctx$geno)
      if (!ok_norm) {
        message("[WARN] could not normalize whitespace in: ", ctx$geno)
      } else {
        message("[OK] normalized whitespace in: ", ctx$geno)
      }
    }

    # Execute worker (or keep as dry-run if DO_RUN <- FALSE)
    if (isTRUE(DO_RUN)) {
      w_ok <- tryCatch(worker_fun(ctx), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(w_ok, "error")) {
        message("[ERR] worker failed: ", conditionMessage(w_ok))
        results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "worker_error", error = conditionMessage(w_ok))
      } else {
        results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "done")
      }
    } else {
      message("[DRY] Set DO_RUN <- TRUE and customize worker_fun() to execute real work.")
      results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "dry")
    }
  }
}

# Compact run summary
summary_dt <- rbindlist(lapply(results, function(x) {
  data.table(
    Pop = x$ctx$POP,
    Chr = x$ctx$CHR,
    Sub = x$ctx$subgenome,
    REC = x$ctx$REC,
    DON = x$ctx$DON,
    Status = x$status
  )
}), fill = TRUE)

print(summary_dt)

```

```{r}

##################################################
## Heterozygote smoothing for AI2 .genotypes files
##################################################

# Process AlphaImpute2 output to reduce long retained heterozygote runs
# - For each WIL:
#   Replace heterozygote runs ONLY if both flanking markers indicate the same origin (RP or DON)

args <- commandArgs(trailingOnly = TRUE)
get_arg <- function(flag, default = NULL) {
  idx <- match(flag, args)
  if (!is.na(idx) && idx < length(args)) return(args[idx + 1])
  default
}

ROOT    <- get_arg("--root", "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly")
POP_IN  <- get_arg("--pop",  NA_character_)   # optional: single pop like "Pop30"
CHR_IN  <- get_arg("--chr",  NA_character_)   # optional: single chr like "chr1A"
RUN_TAG <- get_arg("--run",  "runs_pedOnly_l1")
OUT_RUN <- get_arg("--out_run", paste0(RUN_TAG, "_smoothed"))

# Parent mapping
pop_map <- data.table::data.table(
  pop    = c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80),
  REC    = c("RP2","RP2","RP2","RP1","RP1","RP1","RP1"),
  DON_AB = c("WE30","WE32","WE34","WE41","WE42","WE46","WE80"),
  DON_D  = c("TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA1")
)

# Helpers
read_genotypes_dt <- function(path) {
  dt <- data.table::fread(path, header = FALSE, sep = "\t", data.table = TRUE, fill = TRUE, showProgress = FALSE)
  if (ncol(dt) < 2) stop("Unexpected .genotypes format (need >= 2 cols): ", path)
  dt
}

write_genotypes_dt <- function(dt, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  data.table::fwrite(dt, file = path, sep = "\t", col.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
}

get_pop_num <- function(pop_name) {
  # Pop30 -> 30
  as.integer(sub("^Pop", "", pop_name))
}

get_subgenome_from_chr <- function(chr_name) {
  sg <- sub("^.*([ABD])$", "\\1", chr_name)
  if (!sg %in% c("A", "B", "D")) return(NA_character_)
  sg
}

get_parents_for_target <- function(pop_name, chr_name, pop_map_dt) {
  pop_num <- get_pop_num(pop_name)
  sg <- get_subgenome_from_chr(chr_name)
  if (is.na(pop_num) || is.na(sg)) return(list(ok = FALSE, msg = "Could not parse pop or subgenome"))

  row <- pop_map_dt[pop == pop_num]
  if (nrow(row) != 1) return(list(ok = FALSE, msg = paste0("Pop not in pop_map: ", pop_num)))

  rp <- row$REC[1]
  don <- if (sg %in% c("A", "B")) row$DON_AB[1] else row$DON_D[1]

  list(ok = TRUE, rp = rp, don = don, pop_num = pop_num, subgenome = sg)
}

# Core smoothing for one .genotypes matrix
smooth_one_dt <- function(dt, rp_id, don_id) {
  ids <- dt[[1]]
  rp_row  <- which(ids == rp_id)
  don_row <- which(ids == don_id)

  if (length(rp_row) != 1)  stop("RP row not found or not unique: ", rp_id)
  if (length(don_row) != 1) stop("DON row not found or not unique: ", don_id)

  G <- as.matrix(dt[, -1, with = FALSE])
  storage.mode(G) <- "integer"

  rp  <- G[rp_row, ]
  don <- G[don_row, ]

  # Define flanking markers
  elig <- (rp %in% c(0L, 2L)) & (don %in% c(0L, 2L)) & (rp != don)

  # QC table: per-individual heterozygosity before/after and how many hets were replaced
  qc <- data.table::data.table(
    ID = ids,
    Het_before = NA_real_,
    Het_after  = NA_real_,
    Het_replaced = NA_integer_
  )

  # Helper: determine whether a given genotype value matches RP or DON at a position
  # Returns:
  # - 1 = matches RP genotype
  # - 2 = matches DON genotype
  match_parent <- function(w, rp_g, don_g) {
    if (is.na(w) || w %in% c(1L, 9L)) return(NA_integer_)  # exclude het and missing
    if (!is.na(rp_g)  && w == rp_g)  return(1L)
    if (!is.na(don_g) && w == don_g) return(2L)
    NA_integer_
  }

  if (!any(elig)) {
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(G))) {
      h <- mean(G[i, ] == 1L)
      qc[i, `:=`(Het_before = h, Het_after = h, Het_replaced = 0L)]
    }
    return(list(dt_out = dt, qc = qc))
  }

  n_ind <- nrow(G)
  n_mrk <- ncol(G)
  idx_elig <- which(elig)

  # iterate over all WILs
  for (i in seq_len(n_ind)) {
    wil <- G[i, ]

    if (i == rp_row || i == don_row) {
      h <- mean(wil == 1L)
      qc[i, `:=`(Het_before = h, Het_after = h, Het_replaced = 0L)]
      next
    }

    het_before <- mean(wil == 1L)

    anchor_type <- rep(NA_integer_, n_mrk)
    w_e   <- wil[idx_elig]
    rp_e  <- rp[idx_elig]
    don_e <- don[idx_elig]
    anchor_type[idx_elig][w_e == rp_e]  <- 1L
    anchor_type[idx_elig][w_e == don_e] <- 2L

    # Identify heterozygote runs (value = 1)
    is_het <- (wil == 1L)
    if (!any(is_het)) {
      qc[i, `:=`(Het_before = het_before, Het_after = het_before, Het_replaced = 0L)]
      next
    }

    r <- rle(is_het)
    ends <- cumsum(r$lengths)
    starts <- ends - r$lengths + 1L

    replaced <- 0L

    for (k in seq_along(r$values)) {
      if (!r$values[k]) next
      a <- starts[k]
      b <- ends[k]

      if (a <= 1L || b >= n_mrk) next

      # nearest anchor to left of run
      left_candidates <- which(!is.na(anchor_type[seq_len(a - 1L)]))
      left_anchor <- if (length(left_candidates) == 0L) NA_integer_ else left_candidates[length(left_candidates)]

      # nearest anchor to right of run
      right_candidates <- which(!is.na(anchor_type[(b + 1L):n_mrk]))
      right_anchor <- if (length(right_candidates) == 0L) NA_integer_ else (b + right_candidates[1L])

      if (is.na(left_anchor) || is.na(right_anchor)) next

      lt <- anchor_type[left_anchor]
      rt <- anchor_type[right_anchor]
      # only smooth if both flanks exist and agree in parental origin
      if (is.na(lt) || is.na(rt) || lt != rt) next

      old <- wil[a:b]

      # Fill using the chosen parent's genotype at each marker position
      if (lt == 1L) {
        wil[a:b] <- rp[a:b]
      } else if (lt == 2L) {
        wil[a:b] <- don[a:b]
      }

      replaced <- replaced + sum(old == 1L & wil[a:b] != 1L)
    }

    # accommodate chromosome ends
    anchor_pos <- which(!is.na(anchor_type))
    if (length(anchor_pos) > 0L) {
      first_anchor <- anchor_pos[1L]
      last_anchor  <- anchor_pos[length(anchor_pos)]

      # left end
      if (first_anchor > 1L) {
        # determine whether the first marker matches RP or DON
        left_origin <- match_parent(wil[1L], rp[1L], don[1L])
        if (!is.na(left_origin)) {
          if (anchor_type[first_anchor] == left_origin) {
            idx <- 1L:(first_anchor - 1L)
            old <- wil[idx]
            if (left_origin == 1L) {
              wil[idx] <- rp[idx]
            } else {
              wil[idx] <- don[idx]
            }
            replaced <- replaced + sum(old == 1L & wil[idx] != 1L)
          }
        }
      }

      # right end
      if (last_anchor < n_mrk) {
        right_origin <- match_parent(wil[n_mrk], rp[n_mrk], don[n_mrk])
        if (!is.na(right_origin)) {
          if (anchor_type[last_anchor] == right_origin) {
            idx <- (last_anchor + 1L):n_mrk
            old <- wil[idx]
            if (right_origin == 1L) {
              wil[idx] <- rp[idx]
            } else {
              wil[idx] <- don[idx]
            }
            replaced <- replaced + sum(old == 1L & wil[idx] != 1L)
          }
        }
      }
    }

    # Write smoothed WIL back into matrix
    G[i, ] <- wil
    het_after <- mean(wil == 1L)

    # Record QC metrics for this individual
    qc[i, `:=`(
      Het_before = het_before,
      Het_after  = het_after,
      Het_replaced = replaced
    )]
  }

  dt_out <- data.table::copy(dt)
  dt_out[, (2:ncol(dt_out)) := data.table::as.data.table(G)]
  list(dt_out = dt_out, qc = qc)
}

# Identify directories
pop_dirs <- if (!is.na(POP_IN)) {
  file.path(ROOT, POP_IN)
} else {
  list.dirs(ROOT, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
}
pop_dirs <- pop_dirs[grepl("/Pop[0-9]+$", pop_dirs)]
if (length(pop_dirs) == 0) stop("No Pop* directories found under root: ", ROOT)

targets <- list()

for (pdir in pop_dirs) {
  pop <- basename(pdir)
  run_dir <- file.path(pdir, "AI2", RUN_TAG)
  if (!dir.exists(run_dir)) next

  chr_dirs <- if (!is.na(CHR_IN)) {
    file.path(run_dir, CHR_IN)
  } else {
    list.dirs(run_dir, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
  }
  chr_dirs <- chr_dirs[grepl("(^|/)chr", chr_dirs)]

  for (cdir in chr_dirs) {
    chr <- basename(cdir)
    geno_file <- file.path(cdir, paste0(chr, ".genotypes"))
    if (!file.exists(geno_file)) next

    pm <- get_parents_for_target(pop, chr, pop_map)
    if (!isTRUE(pm$ok)) {
      warning("[", pop, " ", chr, "] Skipping (parent mapping failed): ", pm$msg)
      next
    }

    out_file <- file.path(pdir, "AI2", OUT_RUN, chr, paste0(chr, ".genotypes"))
    qc_file  <- file.path(pdir, "AI2", OUT_RUN, chr, paste0(chr, ".smoothing_qc.tsv"))

    targets[[length(targets) + 1L]] <- list(
      pop = pop,
      chr = chr,
      rp = pm$rp,
      don = pm$don,
      infile = geno_file,
      outfile = out_file,
      qcfile = qc_file
    )
  }
}

if (length(targets) == 0) {
  stop("No .genotypes targets found. Check --root, --run, and optional --pop/--chr filters.")
}

message("Found ", length(targets), " target(s). Running smoothing...")

# Process target directories
qc_all <- list()

for (t in targets) {
  message("[", t$pop, " ", t$chr, "] RP=", t$rp, " DON=", t$don)
  dt <- read_genotypes_dt(t$infile)

  res <- smooth_one_dt(dt, rp_id = t$rp, don_id = t$don)

  # write smoothed genotypes
  write_genotypes_dt(res$dt_out, t$outfile)

  # write per-chr QC
  qc_dt <- data.table::copy(res$qc)
  qc_dt[, `:=`(Pop = t$pop, Chr = t$chr, RP = t$rp, DON = t$don)]
  data.table::setcolorder(qc_dt, c("Pop", "Chr", "RP", "DON", "ID", "Het_before", "Het_after", "Het_replaced"))
  dir.create(dirname(t$qcfile), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  data.table::fwrite(qc_dt, file = t$qcfile, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)

  qc_all[[length(qc_all) + 1L]] <- qc_dt
}

# Write combined QC summary
qc_all_dt <- data.table::rbindlist(qc_all, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
qc_summary_file <- file.path(ROOT, "AI2", paste0(OUT_RUN, "__QC_all.tsv"))
dir.create(dirname(qc_summary_file), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
data.table::fwrite(qc_all_dt, file = qc_summary_file, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)

message("Done.")
message("Combined QC: ", qc_summary_file)

```

```{r}

##########################################################################################################################################
## Build 1Mb bins of donor allele proportions per WIL and compute moving average smoothed donor proportions to call introgression segments
##########################################################################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# =================== EDIT ROOT IF NEEDED ===================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"

POPS <- c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80)
CHRS <- c("1A","1B","1D","2A","2B","2D","3A","3B","3D","4A","4B","4D","5A","5B","5D","6A","6B","6D","7A","7B","7D")

# Parent mapping (AB uses WE, D uses TA)
pop_map <- data.table::data.table(
  pop    = c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80),
  REC    = c("RP2","RP2","RP2","RP1","RP1","RP1","RP1"),
  DON_AB = c("WE30","WE32","WE34","WE41","WE42","WE46","WE80"),
  DON_D  = c("TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA2","TA1")
)

# ----------------- Pipeline toggles -----------------
DO_RUN        <- TRUE   # must be TRUE to execute
NORMALIZE     <- TRUE   # normalize whitespace in AI2 genotypes
STOP_ON_ERR   <- TRUE
FORCE_REBIN   <- TRUE  # if TRUE, rebuild bins even if cached file exists
REBIN_IF_OLDER_THAN_DAYS <- NA_integer_

# ----------------- Binning parameters -----------------
BIN_SIZE_BP        <- 1e6  # 1 Mb raw bins
MIN_SITES_PER_BIN  <- 1L   # minimum informative sites to keep bin row
MIN_ALLELE_COUNT   <- 1L   # minimum total allele count to keep bin row

# ----------------- Smoothing parameter sets -----------------
# Each entry defines one smoothing/segment calling configuration
# Loop over each set and write separate outputs
PARAM_SETS <- list(
  # Tag is derived from fields automatically, but you can add a 'label' for readability in downstream analysis
  list(k10 = 1L,  k40 = 5L, thr10 = 0.80, thr40 = 0.60, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 3L,  k40 = 10L, thr10 = 0.80, thr40 = 0.60, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 5L,  k40 = 20L, thr10 = 0.80, thr40 = 0.60, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 10L,  k40 = 30L, thr10 = 0.80, thr40 = 0.60, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),  
  list(k10 = 25L,  k40 = 50L, thr10 = 0.80, thr40 = 0.60, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),   
  list(k10 = 1L,  k40 = 5L, thr10 = 0.90, thr40 = 0.70, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 3L,  k40 = 10L, thr10 = 0.90, thr40 = 0.70, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 5L,  k40 = 20L, thr10 = 0.90, thr40 = 0.70, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),
  list(k10 = 10L,  k40 = 30L, thr10 = 0.90, thr40 = 0.70, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L),  
  list(k10 = 25L,  k40 = 50L, thr10 = 0.90, thr40 = 0.70, min_seg_len_mb = 1.0, min_sites_for_ma = 1L)  
)

# =================== HELPERS ===================

subkey_for_chr <- function(chr) {
  sg <- substr(chr, nchar(chr), nchar(chr))
  if (sg == "D") "D" else "AB"
}

normalize_genotypes_file <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(FALSE)
  x <- tryCatch(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(x)) return(FALSE)
  x <- gsub("[[:space:]]+", "\t", x, perl = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("\r", "", x, fixed = TRUE)
  tmp <- paste0(path, ".tmp")
  ok <- tryCatch({ writeLines(x, tmp); TRUE }, error = function(e) FALSE)
  if (!ok) return(FALSE)
  ok2 <- file.rename(tmp, path); if (!ok2) unlink(tmp)
  ok2
}

validate_context <- function(POP, CHR) {
  chr_tag <- paste0("chr", CHR)
  pop_dir <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, paste0("Pop", POP), "AI2")

  # AI2 output after imputation and heterozygote smoothing
  geno_dir <- file.path(pop_dir, "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed", chr_tag)
  geno     <- file.path(geno_dir, paste0(chr_tag, ".genotypes"))

  # Per-pop SNP maps
  map_primary  <- file.path(pop_dir, "snp", sprintf("%s_Pop%d.markers.snp", chr_tag, POP))
  map_fallback <- file.path(pop_dir, "snp", sprintf("%s_Pop%d.markers.snp", chr_tag, POP))
  mapf <- if (file.exists(map_primary)) map_primary else map_fallback

  ped  <- file.path(pop_dir, sprintf("pop%d_ped.txt", POP))

  subkey  <- subkey_for_chr(CHR)
  parents <- pop_map[pop == POP]
  rec     <- parents$REC
  don     <- if (identical(subkey, "D")) parents$DON_D else parents$DON_AB

  missing <- character(0)
  if (!file.exists(geno)) missing <- c(missing, geno)
  if (!file.exists(mapf)) missing <- c(missing, paste(map_primary, "or", map_fallback))
  if (!file.exists(ped))  missing <- c(missing, ped)

  list(
    POP = POP, CHR = CHR, chr_tag = chr_tag,
    pop_dir = pop_dir, geno_dir = geno_dir,
    geno = geno, map = mapf, ped = ped,
    subkey = subkey, subgenome = substr(CHR, nchar(CHR), nchar(CHR)),
    REC = rec, DON = don,
    missing = missing
  )
}

# Count RP vs DON alleles for a vector of individual calls within an informative block
# - il_vec = individual genotype calls at informative markers in one bin
# - rp_vec = RP parent calls at same markers
# - dn_vec = donor parent calls at same markers 
# Return:
# - HW = count of RP alleles in bin
# - WE = count of donor alleles in bin
# - n = total alleles counted
# - sites_used = number of informative markers with nonmissing genotype for each WIL
# Note: heterozygotes contribute 1 allele to both
count_bin_hw_we <- function(il_vec, rp_vec, dn_vec) {
  keep <- (il_vec != 9L)
  if (!any(keep)) return(c(0L,0L,0L,0L))     # HW, WE, n_alleles, n_sites_used
  il <- il_vec[keep]; rp <- rp_vec[keep]; dn <- dn_vec[keep]
  het <- (il == 1L)
  hw_match <- (!het) & (il == rp)
  we_match <- (!het) & (il == dn)
  HW <- sum(hw_match) * 2L + sum(het)
  WE <- sum(we_match) * 2L + sum(het)
  n  <- HW + WE
  sites_used <- length(il)
  c(HW, WE, n, sites_used)
}

# Centered moving average
# For each bin, average donor allele props over bins that are present and have sites >= min_sites
ma_centered <- function(x, sites, k, min_sites) {
  n <- length(x)
  out <- rep(NA_real_, n)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    lo <- max(1L, i - k)
    hi <- min(n,   i + k)
    ok <- !is.na(x[lo:hi]) & sites[lo:hi] >= min_sites
    if (any(ok)) out[i] <- mean(x[lo:hi][ok])
  }
  out
}

bins_out_path <- function(ctx) {
  file.path(ctx$geno_dir, sprintf("Pop%d_%s_bins.tsv", ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag))
}

param_tag <- function(p) {
  sprintf("k10-%d_k40-%d_th10-%s_th40-%s",
          as.integer(p$k10), as.integer(p$k40),
          format(p$thr10, trim=TRUE), format(p$thr40, trim=TRUE),
          format(p$min_seg_len_mb, trim=TRUE), as.integer(p$min_sites_for_ma))
}

# =================== Stage 1: BINNING ===================

build_bins <- function(ctx) {
  CHR <- ctx$CHR
  POP <- ctx$POP

  # Ensure output directory exists
  if (!dir.exists(ctx$geno_dir)) dir.create(ctx$geno_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Optionally normalize whitespace
  if (isTRUE(NORMALIZE)) {
    ok_norm <- normalize_genotypes_file(ctx$geno)
    if (!ok_norm) message("[WARN] could not normalize whitespace in: ", ctx$geno)
  }

  # ---- Read SNP map ----
  # map must contain SNP_ID, Chr, Pos, A1, A2
  # the order of the map rows must be the same as the order of the genotype columns
  map <- tryCatch(
    fread(ctx$map, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", quote = "", data.table = FALSE, check.names = FALSE),
    error = function(e) stop("Failed to read map: ", ctx$map, " | ", e$message)
  )
  need_map <- c("SNP_ID","Chr","Pos","A1","A2")
  if (!all(need_map %in% names(map))) {
    stop("Map missing required columns in ", ctx$map, " -> need: ", paste(need_map, collapse = ", "))
  }
  pos <- as.integer(map$Pos)
  if (anyNA(pos)) stop("Map Pos has NA for ", CHR)

  # ---- Read AI2 genotypes (headerless; rows = samples, col1=ID, rest=markers) ----
  geno <- tryCatch(
    read.table(ctx$geno, header = FALSE, sep = "", quote = "", comment.char = "",
               stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE),
    error = function(e) stop("Failed to read genotypes: ", ctx$geno, " | ", e$message)
  )
  colnames(geno)[1] <- "Sample"
  if ((ncol(geno) - 1L) != nrow(map)) {
    stop(sprintf("%s: marker count mismatch (geno cols-1=%d vs map n=%d).",
                 CHR, ncol(geno)-1L, nrow(map)))
  }
  colnames(geno)[-1] <- map$SNP_ID

  # ---- Identify parents and progeny subset ----
  rp_row <- which(geno$Sample == ctx$REC)
  dn_row <- which(geno$Sample == ctx$DON)
  if (length(rp_row) != 1L) stop(CHR, ": REC not found uniquely: ", ctx$REC)
  if (length(dn_row) != 1L) stop(CHR, ": DON not found uniquely: ", ctx$DON)

  patt <- paste0("^WIL", POP, "\\.")
  il_idx <- grep(patt, geno$Sample)
  if (!length(il_idx)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s Pop%02d] No WIL progeny found; skipping.", CHR, POP))
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }

  rp <- as.integer(unlist(geno[rp_row, -1], use.names = FALSE))
  dn <- as.integer(unlist(geno[dn_row, -1], use.names = FALSE))

  # Informative markers
  inf <- (rp %in% c(0L,2L)) & (dn %in% c(0L,2L)) & (rp != dn) & (rp != 9L) & (dn != 9L)
  if (!any(inf)) {
    message(sprintf("[%s Pop%02d] No informative SNPs; skipping.", CHR, POP))
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }

  pos_inf <- pos[inf]
  rp_inf  <- rp[inf]
  dn_inf  <- dn[inf]

  # ---- Define bins ----
  max_pos <- max(pos_inf, na.rm = TRUE)
  starts  <- seq.int(0L, max_pos, by = BIN_SIZE_BP)
  ends    <- pmin(starts + BIN_SIZE_BP - 1L, max_pos)
  bin_id  <- as.integer(pos_inf %/% BIN_SIZE_BP)    # 0-based bin indices
  idx_by_bin <- split(seq_along(pos_inf), bin_id)

  bins_out <- bins_out_path(ctx)
  cat(paste(c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End","HW_count","WE_count","HW_prop","WE_prop","Sites"), collapse = "\t"),
      "\n", file = bins_out)

  # For each WIL
  for (i in il_idx) {
    acc   <- geno$Sample[i]
    il    <- as.integer(unlist(geno[i, -1], use.names = FALSE))
    il_inf <- il[inf]
    
    #For each bin
    for (nm in names(idx_by_bin)) {
      b <- as.integer(nm)
      idx <- idx_by_bin[[nm]]
      # Count alleles and sites in this bin for this WIL
      res <- count_bin_hw_we(il_inf[idx], rp_inf[idx], dn_inf[idx])
      HW <- res[1]; WE <- res[2]; n <- res[3]; nsites <- res[4]
      if (nsites < MIN_SITES_PER_BIN) next
      if (n      < MIN_ALLELE_COUNT)  next
      st <- starts[b + 1L]; en <- ends[b + 1L]
      HWp <- round(HW / n, 2); WEp <- round(WE / n, 2)
      cat(paste(acc, CHR, st, en, HW, WE, HWp, WEp, nsites, sep = "\t"),
          "\n", file = bins_out, append = TRUE)
    }
  }
  message(sprintf("[bins] Wrote: %s", bins_out))
  TRUE
}

# =================== Stage 2: smoothing and segment calling ===================

smooth_and_segments <- function(ctx, p) {
  bins_out <- bins_out_path(ctx)
  if (!file.exists(bins_out)) {
    stop("No bins file found for smoothing: ", bins_out, " (build bins first)")
  }

  bins <- tryCatch(
    fread(bins_out, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", data.table = FALSE, check.names = FALSE),
    error = function(e) stop("Failed to read bins_out: ", bins_out, " | ", e$message)
  )
  if (!nrow(bins)) {
    message(sprintf("[smooth] No bins in %s; skipping smoothing.", bins_out))
    return(invisible(FALSE))
  }

  bins$Start   <- as.integer(bins$Start)
  bins$End     <- as.integer(bins$End)
  bins$WE_prop <- as.numeric(bins$WE_prop)
  bins$Sites   <- as.integer(bins$Sites)

  # Sort & split by Acc × Chrom
  bins <- bins[order(bins$Acc, bins$Chrom, bins$Start, bins$End), ]
  keys <- paste(bins$Acc, bins$Chrom, sep = "||")
  grp  <- split(seq_len(nrow(bins)), keys)

  smooth_rows <- vector("list", length(grp))
  seg_rows    <- list()
  si <- 0L

  for (nm in names(grp)) {
    idx <- grp[[nm]]
    g   <- bins[idx, , drop = FALSE]

    WE_MA10 <- ma_centered(g$WE_prop, g$Sites, k = p$k10, min_sites = p$min_sites_for_ma)
    WE_MA40 <- ma_centered(g$WE_prop, g$Sites, k = p$k40, min_sites = p$min_sites_for_ma)

    # Bin-level donor calling rule
    # DONOR = TRUE if either the short- or long-range window MA passes threshold
    donor_bin <- (WE_MA10 >= p$thr10) | (WE_MA40 >= p$thr40)
    donor_bin[is.na(donor_bin)] <- FALSE

    si <- si + 1L
    smooth_rows[[si]] <- data.frame(
      Acc     = g$Acc,
      Chrom   = g$Chrom,
      Start   = g$Start,
      End     = g$End,
      WE_prop = g$WE_prop,
      Sites   = g$Sites,
      WE_MA10 = round(WE_MA10, 3),
      WE_MA40 = round(WE_MA40, 3),
      DONOR   = donor_bin,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    # Convert consecutive donor bins to segments
    r <- rle(donor_bin)
    ends_r   <- cumsum(r$lengths)
    starts_r <- c(1, head(ends_r, -1) + 1)

    # For each donor segment
    for (j in seq_along(r$values)) {
      if (!r$values[j]) next
      i1 <- starts_r[j]; i2 <- ends_r[j]
      seg_start <- g$Start[i1]
      seg_end   <- g$End[i2]
      seg_len_mb <- (seg_end - seg_start + 1) / 1e6
      if (seg_len_mb < p$min_seg_len_mb) next

      # Mean donor proportion across bins in segment, weighted by sites so sparse bins contribute less
      sel <- i1:i2
      w   <- g$Sites[sel]; w[is.na(w)] <- 0L
      wsum <- sum(w)
      mean_we <- if (wsum > 0) sum(g$WE_prop[sel] * w, na.rm = TRUE) / wsum else NA_real_
      mean_sites <- mean(g$Sites[sel], na.rm = TRUE)

      seg_rows[[length(seg_rows) + 1L]] <- data.frame(
        Acc       = g$Acc[1],
        Chrom     = g$Chrom[1],
        Start     = seg_start,
        End       = seg_end,
        LengthMb  = round(seg_len_mb, 3),
        NumBins   = length(sel),
        Mean_WE   = round(mean_we, 3),
        MeanSites = round(mean_sites, 2),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }

  tag <- param_tag(p)
  out_smooth <- file.path(ctx$geno_dir, sprintf("Pop%d_%s_bins_smooth__%s.tsv", ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag, tag))
  out_seg    <- file.path(ctx$geno_dir, sprintf("Pop%d_%s_segments__%s.tsv",    ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag, tag))

  smooth_df  <- do.call(rbind, smooth_rows)
  write.table(smooth_df, out_smooth, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
  message(sprintf("[smooth] Wrote: %s", out_smooth))

  if (length(seg_rows)) {
    seg_df <- do.call(rbind, seg_rows)
    seg_df <- seg_df[order(seg_df$Acc, seg_df$Chrom, seg_df$Start), ]
    attr(seg_df, "params") <- p
    write.table(seg_df, out_seg, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
  } else {
    write.table(data.frame(Acc=character(), Chrom=character(), Start=integer(),
                           End=integer(), LengthMb=double(), NumBins=integer(),
                           Mean_WE=double(), MeanSites=double()),
                out_seg, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE)
  }
  message(sprintf("[segments] Wrote: %s", out_seg))
  TRUE
}

needs_rebin <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(TRUE)
  if (isTRUE(FORCE_REBIN)) return(TRUE)
  if (!is.na(REBIN_IF_OLDER_THAN_DAYS)) {
    age_days <- as.numeric(difftime(Sys.time(), file.info(path)$mtime, units = "days"))
    if (!is.na(age_days) && (age_days > REBIN_IF_OLDER_THAN_DAYS)) return(TRUE)
  }
  FALSE
}

results <- list(); idx <- 0L
for (POP in POPS) {
  for (CHR in CHRS) {
    idx <- idx + 1L
    ctx <- validate_context(POP, CHR)

    message("----------------------------------------------------------------")
    message(sprintf("[READY] Pop%02d %s (subgenome=%s, key=%s)",
                    ctx$POP, ctx$chr_tag, ctx$subgenome, ctx$subkey))
    message("   MAP: ", ctx$map)
    message("  GENO: ", ctx$geno)
    message("   PED: ", ctx$ped)
    message(sprintf(" Parents: REC=%s  DON=%s", ctx$REC, ctx$DON))

    if (length(ctx$missing)) {
      message("[SKIP] Missing prerequisites:\n  - ", paste(ctx$missing, collapse = "\n  - "))
      if (isTRUE(STOP_ON_ERR)) stop("Stopping on first missing prerequisite.")
      results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "missing")
      next
    }

    # 1) Build (or reuse) bins
    bins_path <- bins_out_path(ctx)
    if (needs_rebin(bins_path)) {
      message(sprintf("[stage1] (re)building bins -> %s", bins_path))
      b_ok <- tryCatch(build_bins(ctx), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(b_ok, "error")) {
        message("[ERR] build_bins failed: ", conditionMessage(b_ok))
        results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "bin_error", error = conditionMessage(b_ok))
        if (isTRUE(STOP_ON_ERR)) stop("Stopping on bin build error.")
        next
      }
    } else {
      message(sprintf("[cache] Using existing bins: %s", bins_path))
    }

    # 2) Run smoothing/segment calling for each parameter set
    for (p in PARAM_SETS) {
      s_ok <- tryCatch(smooth_and_segments(ctx, p), error = function(e) e)
      if (inherits(s_ok, "error")) {
        message("[ERR] smoothing failed (", param_tag(p), "): ", conditionMessage(s_ok))
        if (isTRUE(STOP_ON_ERR)) stop("Stopping on smoothing error.")
      }
    }
    results[[idx]] <- list(ctx = ctx, status = "done")
  }
}

summary_dt <- rbindlist(lapply(results, function(x) {
  data.table(
    Pop = x$ctx$POP,
    Chr = x$ctx$CHR,
    Sub = x$ctx$subgenome,
    REC = x$ctx$REC,
    DON = x$ctx$DON,
    Status = x$status
  )
}), fill = TRUE)

print(summary_dt)

```

```{r}

#####################
## Aggregate segments
#####################

# Collect all segment TSVs produced by smoothing and combine them into a master segment table
# Produce an index of empty segment files
# Generate summaries: pop x chr x method, pop x method, pop x subgenome x method

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# =================== EDIT ROOT IF NEEDED ===================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"

# Output directory for aggregated tables
OUTDIR <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, "AI2_aggregates_allparams")
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---- HELPERS ----

# Normalize chromosome labels
norm_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- sub("^chr", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x
}

# Empty segments schema
empty_seg_dt <- function() {
  data.table(
    Acc = character(),
    Chrom = character(),
    Start = integer(),
    End = integer(),
    LengthMb = numeric(),
    NumBins = integer(),
    Mean_WE = numeric(),
    MeanSites = numeric()
  )
}

# Discover all segments files
seg_files <- unlist(lapply(
  list.dirs(ROOT_BYPOP, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE),
  function(pop_dir) {
    runs_dir <- file.path(pop_dir, "AI2", "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")
    if (!dir.exists(runs_dir)) return(character())

    chr_dirs <- list.dirs(runs_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
    unlist(lapply(chr_dirs, function(cd) {
      list.files(
        cd,
        pattern = "_segments(__(.+))?\\.tsv$",
        full.names = TRUE
      )
    }))
  }
), use.names = FALSE)

if (length(seg_files) == 0L) {
  stop("No segment files found under Pop*/AI2/runs/chr*/")
}

if (length(seg_files) == 0) {
  stop("No segment files found under: ", ROOT_BYPOP)
}

# Parse Pop and Chr from filename
parse_meta <- function(fp) {
  bn <- basename(fp)
  m <- str_match(bn, "^Pop(\\d+)_([^_]+)_segments(?:__(.+))?\\.tsv$")
  if (!is.na(m[1,1])) {
    Pop <- as.integer(m[1,2])
    Chr_raw <- m[1,3]
    Method <- ifelse(is.na(m[1,4]) || nchar(m[1,4]) == 0, "untagged", m[1,4])
    return(list(Pop = Pop, Chr = norm_chr(Chr_raw), Method = Method))
  }
  Pop_guess <- as.integer(str_match(fp, "Pop(\\d+)")[,2])
  chr_dir   <- basename(dirname(fp))
  Chr_guess <- norm_chr(chr_dir)
  list(Pop = Pop_guess, Chr = Chr_guess, Method = "untagged")
}

parse_method_fields <- function(Method) {
  if (is.na(Method) || Method == "untagged") return(list())
  parts <- strsplit(Method, "_", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
  out <- list()
  for (p in parts) {
    kv <- strsplit(p, "-", fixed = TRUE)[[1]]
    if (length(kv) >= 2) {
      key <- kv[1]
      val <- paste(kv[-1], collapse = "-")  # keep decimals intact
      out[[key]] <- val
    }
  }
  out
}

safe_read_segments <- function(fp) {
  dt <- tryCatch(
    fread(fp, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = TRUE, na.strings = c("NA", "")),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(dt)) return(empty_seg_dt())
  need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End","LengthMb","NumBins","Mean_WE","MeanSites")
  miss <- setdiff(need, names(dt))
  if (length(miss)) return(empty_seg_dt())
  dt
}

# Read all segments
pieces <- lapply(seg_files, function(fp) {
  meta <- parse_meta(fp)
  dt <- safe_read_segments(fp)

  if (nrow(dt) == 0L) {
    return(list(
      data = NULL,
      empty = data.table(SourcePath = fp, Pop = meta$Pop, Chr = meta$Chr, Method = meta$Method)
    ))
  }

  dt[, Chrom := norm_chr(Chrom)]
  dt[, `:=`(
    Pop = meta$Pop,
    Chr = meta$Chr,
    SourcePath = fp,
    Method = meta$Method
  )]
  dt[, Chrom := Chr]

  mf <- parse_method_fields(meta$Method)
  if (length(mf)) {
    for (nm in names(mf)) dt[, (nm) := mf[[nm]] ]
  }

  list(data = dt, empty = NULL)
})

data_list  <- rbindlist(lapply(pieces, `[[`, "data"),  fill = TRUE)
empty_list <- rbindlist(lapply(pieces, `[[`, "empty"), fill = TRUE)

if (nrow(data_list) == 0L) {
  data_list <- empty_seg_dt()[, `:=`(
    Pop = integer(), Chr = character(), SourcePath = character(), Method = character()
  )]
}

# Reorder columns
base_cols <- c("Pop","Acc","Chr","Start","End","LengthMb","NumBins","Mean_WE","MeanSites","Method","SourcePath")
parsed_cols <- setdiff(names(data_list), base_cols)
setcolorder(data_list, c(base_cols, parsed_cols))

# Write master
master_fp <- file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_master.tsv")
fwrite(data_list, master_fp, sep = "\t")

# Write empty files index
empty_fp <- file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_empty_files.tsv")
if (nrow(empty_list)) {
  setorder(empty_list, Pop, Chr, Method, SourcePath)
  fwrite(empty_list, empty_fp, sep = "\t")
} else {
  fwrite(data.table(SourcePath=character(), Pop=integer(), Chr=character(), Method=character()),
         empty_fp, sep = "\t")
}

# SUMMARY: Pop × Chr × Method
# number of total segments; number of unique accessions; mean segment length; median segment length
if (nrow(data_list)) {
  seg_summary <- data_list[, .(
    n_segments    = .N,
    n_accessions  = uniqueN(Acc),
    mean_len_mb   = round(mean(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    median_len_mb = round(stats::median(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  ), by = .(Pop, Chr, Method)]

  setorder(seg_summary, Pop, Chr, Method)
  fwrite(seg_summary, file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Chr_Method.tsv"), sep = "\t")
} else {
  fwrite(data.table(Pop=integer(), Chr=character(), Method=character(),
                    n_segments=integer(), n_accessions=integer(),
                    mean_len_mb=numeric(), median_len_mb=numeric()),
         file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Chr_Method.tsv"), sep = "\t")
}

# SUMMARY: Pop × Method
if (nrow(data_list)) {
  seg_summary_pop <- data_list[, .(
    n_segments    = .N,
    n_accessions  = uniqueN(Acc),
    mean_len_mb   = round(mean(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    median_len_mb = round(stats::median(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  ), by = .(Pop, Method)]
  setorder(seg_summary_pop, Pop, Method)
  fwrite(seg_summary_pop, file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Method.tsv"), sep = "\t")
}

# ---------- Console summary ----------
cat("\n[OK] Wrote:\n",
    "- MASTER: ", master_fp, "\n",
    "- EMPTY INDEX: ", empty_fp, "\n",
    "- SUMMARY by Pop×Chr×Method: ",
    file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Chr_Method.tsv"), "\n",
    "- (Optional) SUMMARY by Pop×Method: ",
    file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Method.tsv"), "\n",
    sep = "")

# SUMMARY: Pop × Subgenome × Method
if (nrow(data_list)) {

  data_list[, Subgenome := toupper(sub(".*([ABD])$", "\\1", Chr))]

  seg_summary_subg <- data_list[, .(
    n_segments    = .N,
    n_accessions  = uniqueN(Acc),
    mean_len_mb   = round(mean(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3),
    median_len_mb = round(stats::median(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
  ), by = .(Pop, Subgenome, Method)]

  setorder(seg_summary_subg, Pop, Subgenome, Method)
  fwrite(
    seg_summary_subg,
    file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Subgenome_Method.tsv"),
    sep = "\t"
  )

} else {

  fwrite(
    data.table(
      Pop = integer(),
      Subgenome = character(),
      Method = character(),
      n_segments = integer(),
      n_accessions = integer(),
      mean_len_mb = numeric(),
      median_len_mb = numeric()
    ),
    file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_summary_by_Pop_Subgenome_Method.tsv"),
    sep = "\t"
  )
}

```

```{r}

#############################
## Marker density diagnostics
#############################

# Distribution of sites per bin by population
# Segment support summary across all populations

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# ===================== EDIT THESE =====================
ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POPS <- c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80)
RUN_DIR <- "AI2/runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed"
BIN_FILE_PATTERN <- "^Pop\\d+_chr[1-7][ABD]_bins\\.tsv$"
OUTDIR_TAG <- "sites_distribution_1Mb_bins"

out_root <- file.path(ROOT, OUTDIR_TAG)
dir.create(out_root, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Sites per bin distribution by population
all_dists <- rbindlist(lapply(POPS, function(pop) {

  pop_dir <- file.path(ROOT, sprintf("Pop%d", pop), RUN_DIR)

  files <- list.files(
    pop_dir,
    pattern = BIN_FILE_PATTERN,
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )

  if (length(files) == 0L) {
    message(sprintf("Pop%d: no bin files found in %s", pop, pop_dir))
    return(NULL)
  }

  bins <- rbindlist(lapply(files, function(f) {
    dt <- fread(f)
    setnames(dt, trimws(names(dt)))
    dt
  }), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

  req <- c("Chrom", "Start", "End", "Sites")
  if (!all(req %in% names(bins))) {
    stop(sprintf(
      "Pop%d: missing required columns. Found: %s",
      pop, paste(names(bins), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  # Collapse bins file to one row per bin to avoid overcounting bins due to multiple WILs per bin in a file
  bins_unique <- unique(bins[, .(Chrom, Start, End, Sites)])

  bins_unique[, Pop := pop]

  # Distribution of how many bins have sites = x
  dist <- bins_unique[, .(n_bins = .N), by = .(Pop, Sites)]
  setorder(dist, Pop, Sites)

  dist
}), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

outfile <- file.path(out_root, "sites_per_bin_distribution_by_population_250kb.tsv")
fwrite(all_dists, outfile, sep = "\t")

print(all_dists)
cat("Wrote: ", outfile, "\n", sep = "")

# ===================== EDIT THESE =====================
ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POPS <- c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80)

AI2_DIR     <- "AI2"
RUN_PATTERN <- "^runs_.*$"   # e.g. runs_200kb, runs_250kb, etc.
SEG_PATTERN <- "^Pop\\d+_chr[1-7][ABD]_segments__.*\\.tsv$"

OUTDIR_TAG <- "segment_support_summary"

out_root <- file.path(ROOT, OUTDIR_TAG)
dir.create(out_root, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Read all segments and attach pop/thinning/MA method metadata
all_segments <- rbindlist(lapply(POPS, function(pop) {

  pop_ai2_dir <- file.path(ROOT, sprintf("Pop%d", pop), AI2_DIR)

  run_dirs_all <- list.dirs(pop_ai2_dir, recursive = FALSE, full.names = TRUE)
  run_dirs <- run_dirs_all[grepl(RUN_PATTERN, basename(run_dirs_all))]

  if (length(run_dirs) == 0L) {
    message(sprintf("Pop%d: no run directories found under %s", pop, pop_ai2_dir))
    return(NULL)
  }

  rbindlist(lapply(run_dirs, function(run_dir) {

    Thinning <- sub("^runs_", "", basename(run_dir))

    files <- list.files(
      run_dir,
      pattern = SEG_PATTERN,
      recursive = TRUE,
      full.names = TRUE
    )

    if (length(files) == 0L) return(NULL)

    rbindlist(lapply(files, function(f) {

      dt <- fread(f)
      setnames(dt, trimws(names(dt)))

      req <- c("LengthMb", "Mean_WE", "MeanSites")
      if (!all(req %in% names(dt))) {
        stop(sprintf(
          "Missing required columns in %s. Found: %s",
          f, paste(names(dt), collapse = ", ")
        ))
      }

      Method <- sub("^.*segments__", "", basename(f))
      Method <- sub("\\.tsv$", "", Method)

      # keep only what we need; preserve segment-level rows
      dt_out <- dt[, .(LengthMb, Mean_WE, MeanSites)]
      dt_out[, `:=`(Pop = pop, Thinning = Thinning, Method = Method)]

      dt_out
    }), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

  }), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

}), use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# Summarize by Pop × Thinning × Method
summary_final <- all_segments[, .(
  n_segments = .N,

  mean_MeanSites   = mean(MeanSites, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_MeanSites = median(MeanSites, na.rm = TRUE),

  mean_MeanWE      = mean(Mean_WE, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_MeanWE    = median(Mean_WE, na.rm = TRUE),

  mean_LengthMb    = mean(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_LengthMb  = median(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Method)]

setorder(summary_final, Pop, Thinning, Method)

outfile <- file.path(out_root, "segment_support_summary_by_pop_thinning_method.tsv")
fwrite(summary_final, outfile, sep = "\t")

print(summary_final)
cat("Wrote: ", outfile, "\n", sep = "")

```

```{r}

#################################
## QC summary (hets, missingness)
#################################

# Outputs:
# - QC_individual_metrics_genomewide: genomewide per-WIL het/missing
# - QC_individual_summaries_genomewide: pop-level summaries of genomewide metrics
# - QC_individual_summaries_bySubgenome: pop x subgenome summaries
# - QC_marker_summaries: pop x subgenome marker-level summaries
# - AI2_QC_metrics_all: R object of individual and marker metrics
# - PNG plots

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
})

# ===================== EDIT THESE =====================
ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POPS <- c(30, 32, 34, 41, 42, 46, 80)

# Directories under PopXX/AI2/ to include 
RUN_DIRS <- c("runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")

OUTDIR <- file.path(ROOT, "AI2_QC_metrics_plots_smoothed_l1")
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

MISSING_CODE <- 9L
# ======================================================

save_png <- function(filename, width=14, height=5, dpi=200, plot_obj) {
  fn <- file.path(OUTDIR, filename)
  if (requireNamespace("ragg", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ragg::agg_png(fn, width = width, height = height, units = "in", res = dpi)
    print(plot_obj)
    dev.off()
  } else {
    grDevices::png(fn, width = width, height = height, units = "in", res = dpi, type = "cairo")
    print(plot_obj)
    dev.off()
  }
  message("Wrote: ", fn)
}

# Metrics from genotype matrix
calc_individual_metrics <- function(G) {
  # number of non-missing markers per WIL (denominator for Het rate)
  n_called <- rowSums(!is.na(G))
  # total marker columns (denominator for missingness rate)
  n_mark   <- ncol(G)

  # number of heterozygous calls per WIL among called markers
  het_n <- rowSums(G == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  # number of missing calls per individual
  miss_n <- rowSums(is.na(G))

  data.table(
    N_markers = n_mark,
    N_called  = n_called,
    Het_N     = het_n,
    Miss_N    = miss_n,
    Het       = ifelse(n_called > 0, het_n / n_called, NA_real_),
    Missing   = ifelse(n_mark   > 0, miss_n / n_mark,  NA_real_)
  )
}

calc_marker_metrics <- function(G) {
  n0 <- colSums(G == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  n1 <- colSums(G == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  n2 <- colSums(G == 2, na.rm = TRUE)

  n_called <- n0 + n1 + n2
  denom <- 2 * n_called
  alt_dose <- n1 + 2 * n2

  p <- ifelse(denom > 0, alt_dose / denom, NA_real_)
  maf <- pmin(p, 1 - p)

  data.table(
    MAF = maf,
    Het = ifelse(n_called > 0, n1 / n_called, NA_real_),
    Missing = colMeans(is.na(G))
  )
}

# Find genotype files for a given pop/run
find_geno_files <- function(pop, run_dir) {
  base <- file.path(ROOT, paste0("Pop", pop), "AI2", run_dir)
  if (!dir.exists(base)) return(character())
  list.files(base, pattern = "\\.genotypes$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
}

# Parse subgenome from chromosome directory or filename
infer_subgenome <- function(path) {
  m <- str_match(path, "(chr[0-9]+[ABD])")
  chr <- m[,2]
  if (is.na(chr)) return(NA_character_)
  substr(chr, nchar(chr), nchar(chr)) # A/B/D
}

theme_qc <- theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )

# Plot helpers
plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_subg <- function(ind_dt, metric_col, ylab, title_prefix, filename_prefix) {
  for (th in RUN_DIRS) {
    d <- ind_dt[Thinning == th]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) next

    p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = PopNum, y = get(metric_col))) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
      geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.18, height = 0),
                 alpha = 0.25, size = 0.5) +
      facet_wrap(~ Subgenome, nrow = 1) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)) +
      labs(
        x = "Population",
        y = ylab,
        title = paste0(title_prefix, " (Population × Subgenome): ", th)
      ) +
      theme_qc

    save_png(paste0(filename_prefix, "_", th, ".png"),
             width = 16, height = 4.5, dpi = 300, plot_obj = p)
  }
}

plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_genome <- function(ind_genome, metric_col, ylab, title_prefix, filename_prefix) {
  for (th in RUN_DIRS) {
    d <- ind_genome[Thinning == th]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) next

    p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = PopNum, y = get(metric_col))) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
      geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.18, height = 0),
                 alpha = 0.25, size = 0.5) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)) +
      labs(
        x = "Population",
        y = ylab,
        title = paste0(title_prefix, " (Genome-wide): ", th)
      ) +
      theme_qc

    save_png(paste0(filename_prefix, "_", th, ".png"),
             width = 12, height = 4.5, dpi = 300, plot_obj = p)
  }
}

plot_marker_metric_per_thinning <- function(mrk_dt, metric_col, ylab, title_prefix, filename_prefix) {
  for (th in RUN_DIRS) {
    d <- mrk_dt[Thinning == th]
    if (nrow(d) == 0) next

    p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = PopNum, y = get(metric_col))) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
      facet_wrap(~ Subgenome, nrow = 1) +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)) +
      labs(
        x = "Population",
        y = ylab,
        title = paste0(title_prefix, " (Population × Subgenome): ", th)
      ) +
      theme_qc

    save_png(paste0(filename_prefix, "_", th, ".png"),
             width = 16, height = 4.5, dpi = 300, plot_obj = p)
  }
}

# =============== MAIN LOOP ===============
# Accumulate per-file metrics into lists then bind into two tables
# - ind_dt: one row per WIL x chr
# - mrk_dt: one fow per marker
ind_all <- list()
mrk_all <- list()

for (pop in POPS) {
  for (run_dir in RUN_DIRS) {
    files <- find_geno_files(pop, run_dir)
    if (length(files) == 0) next

    message("Pop", pop, " / ", run_dir, " : ", length(files), " files")

    for (f in files) {
      subg <- infer_subgenome(f)
      if (is.na(subg)) next

      dt <- fread(f, header = FALSE, showProgress = FALSE)
      ids <- dt[[1]]

      # keep WIL rows only
      keep <- grepl("^WIL", ids)
      if (!any(keep)) next

      G <- as.matrix(dt[keep, -1, with = FALSE])
      storage.mode(G) <- "integer"

      G[G == MISSING_CODE] <- NA_integer_

      # per-WIL
      ind <- calc_individual_metrics(G)
      ind[, `:=`(
        Pop = paste0("Pop", pop),
        Thinning = run_dir,
        Subgenome = subg,
        File = basename(f),
        ID = ids[keep]
      )]
      ind_all[[length(ind_all) + 1]] <- ind

      # per-marker
      mrk <- calc_marker_metrics(G)
      mrk[, `:=`(
        Pop = paste0("Pop", pop),
        Thinning = run_dir,
        Subgenome = subg,
        File = basename(f)
      )]
      mrk_all[[length(mrk_all) + 1]] <- mrk
    }
  }
}

ind_dt <- rbindlist(ind_all, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
mrk_dt <- rbindlist(mrk_all, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

if (nrow(ind_dt) == 0) stop("No WIL rows found across genotype files. Check ROOT/RUN_DIRS/ID prefixes.")
if (nrow(mrk_dt) == 0) warning("No marker metrics computed (mrk_dt empty).")

ind_dt[, Thinning := factor(Thinning, levels = RUN_DIRS)]
mrk_dt[, Thinning := factor(Thinning, levels = RUN_DIRS)]
ind_dt[, Subgenome := factor(Subgenome, levels = c("A","B","D"))]
mrk_dt[, Subgenome := factor(Subgenome, levels = c("A","B","D"))]

ind_dt[, PopNum := gsub("^Pop", "", Pop)]
mrk_dt[, PopNum := gsub("^Pop", "", Pop)]
ind_dt[, PopNum := factor(PopNum, levels = as.character(POPS))]
mrk_dt[, PopNum := factor(PopNum, levels = as.character(POPS))]

# =============== Genome wide per-WIL metrics ===============
# Het_genome = sum(Het_N) / sum(N_called) (not mean of per-file Het)
# Missing_genome = sum(Miss_N) / sum(N_markers) (not mean of per-file Missing)
ind_genome <- ind_dt[, .(
  N_markers_genome = sum(N_markers, na.rm = TRUE),
  N_called_genome  = sum(N_called,  na.rm = TRUE),
  Het_N_genome     = sum(Het_N,     na.rm = TRUE),
  Miss_N_genome    = sum(Miss_N,    na.rm = TRUE),
  Het_genome       = {
    denom <- sum(N_called, na.rm = TRUE)
    ifelse(denom > 0, sum(Het_N, na.rm = TRUE) / denom, NA_real_)
  },
  Missing_genome   = {
    denom <- sum(N_markers, na.rm = TRUE)
    ifelse(denom > 0, sum(Miss_N, na.rm = TRUE) / denom, NA_real_)
  }
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, ID)]

ind_genome[, PopNum := gsub("^Pop", "", Pop)]
ind_genome[, PopNum := factor(PopNum, levels = as.character(POPS))]
ind_genome[, Thinning := factor(Thinning, levels = RUN_DIRS)]

# Save all metrics
saveRDS(
  list(
    individual_by_subgenome = ind_dt,
    individual_genomewide   = ind_genome,
    marker_by_subgenome     = mrk_dt
  ),
  file = file.path(OUTDIR, "AI2_QC_metrics_all.rds")
)

fwrite(ind_genome, file.path(OUTDIR, "QC_individual_metrics_genomewide.tsv"), sep = "\t")

# =============== SUMMARIES ===============
# A) Per-WIL summaries by subgenome
ind_sum_subg <- ind_dt[, .(
  N_individuals = uniqueN(ID),
  MeanHet = mean(Het, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDHet   = sd(Het, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanMissing = mean(Missing, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDMissing   = sd(Missing, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanCalledMarkers = mean(N_called, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)]

fwrite(ind_sum_subg, file.path(OUTDIR, "QC_individual_summaries_bySubgenome.tsv"), sep = "\t")

# B) Per-WIL summaries genomewide
ind_sum_genome <- ind_genome[, .(
  N_individuals = uniqueN(ID),
  MeanHet_genome = mean(Het_genome, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDHet_genome   = sd(Het_genome, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanMissing_genome = mean(Missing_genome, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDMissing_genome   = sd(Missing_genome, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanCalledMarkers_genome = mean(N_called_genome, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Pop, Thinning)]

fwrite(ind_sum_genome, file.path(OUTDIR, "QC_individual_summaries_genomewide.tsv"), sep = "\t")

# C) Per-marker summaries
mrk_sum <- mrk_dt[, .(
  N_markers = .N,
  MeanMAF = mean(MAF, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDMAF   = sd(MAF, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanHet = mean(Het, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDHet   = sd(Het, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanMissing = mean(Missing, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDMissing   = sd(Missing, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)]

fwrite(mrk_sum, file.path(OUTDIR, "QC_marker_summaries.tsv"), sep = "\t")

# =============== PLOTS ===============
# 1) Subgenome-specific
plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_subg(
  ind_dt          = ind_dt,
  metric_col      = "Het",
  ylab            = "Het rate (per individual)",
  title_prefix    = "Individual Heterozygosity",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_individual_heterozygosity_bySubgenome"
)

plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_subg(
  ind_dt          = ind_dt,
  metric_col      = "Missing",
  ylab            = "Missing rate (per individual)",
  title_prefix    = "Individual Missingness",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_individual_missingness_bySubgenome"
)

# 2) Genome-wide
plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_genome(
  ind_genome      = ind_genome,
  metric_col      = "Het_genome",
  ylab            = "Het rate (genome-wide per individual)",
  title_prefix    = "Individual Heterozygosity",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_individual_heterozygosity_genomewide"
)

plot_individual_metric_per_thinning_genome(
  ind_genome      = ind_genome,
  metric_col      = "Missing_genome",
  ylab            = "Missing rate (genome-wide per individual)",
  title_prefix    = "Individual Missingness",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_individual_missingness_genomewide"
)

# 3) Marker-level plots
plot_marker_metric_per_thinning(
  mrk_dt          = mrk_dt,
  metric_col      = "MAF",
  ylab            = "MAF (per marker)",
  title_prefix    = "Marker Minor Allele Frequency",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_marker_maf"
)

plot_marker_metric_per_thinning(
  mrk_dt          = mrk_dt,
  metric_col      = "Het",
  ylab            = "Het (per marker)",
  title_prefix    = "Marker Heterozygosity",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_marker_heterozygosity"
)

plot_marker_metric_per_thinning(
  mrk_dt          = mrk_dt,
  metric_col      = "Missing",
  ylab            = "Missing (per marker)",
  title_prefix    = "Marker Missingness",
  filename_prefix = "boxplot_marker_missingness"
)

message("[DONE] Outputs written to: ", OUTDIR)
message(" - QC_individual_metrics_genomewide.tsv (use this for filtering)")
message(" - QC_individual_summaries_genomewide.tsv")
message(" - QC_individual_summaries_bySubgenome.tsv")
message(" - QC_marker_summaries.tsv")
message(" - AI2_QC_metrics_all.rds")

# Marker-level table with SNP metadata + Het + MAF

# Location of per-chr SNP map files
SNP_SUBDIR <- "snp"
GENO_RUN_FOR_TABLE <- "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed"
OUT_MARKER_TABLE <- file.path(
  OUTDIR,
  paste0("marker_metrics_with_map_", GENO_RUN_FOR_TABLE, ".tsv")
)

# HELPER: load all SNP maps for one population
read_all_snp_maps_for_pop <- function(pop) {
  snp_dir <- file.path(ROOT, paste0("Pop", pop), "AI2", SNP_SUBDIR)
  if (!dir.exists(snp_dir)) return(NULL)

  snp_files <- list.files(snp_dir, pattern = "\\.markers\\.snp$", full.names = TRUE)
  if (length(snp_files) == 0) return(NULL)

  maps <- lapply(snp_files, function(sf) {
    m <- fread(sf, showProgress = FALSE)
    
    if (!all(c("SNP_ID","Chr","Pos") %in% names(m))) {
      stop("SNP map missing required cols (SNP_ID, Chr, Pos): ", sf)
    }
    m[, `:=`(
      Pop = paste0("Pop", pop),
      PopNum = as.character(pop)
    )]
    m
  })

  rbindlist(maps, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
}

# Build a marker index inside mrk_dt
# This relies on the fact that marker order in the .genotypes matches SNP map order
mrk_for_run <- mrk_dt[Thinning == GENO_RUN_FOR_TABLE]
if (nrow(mrk_for_run) == 0) stop("No marker metrics found for Thinning=", GENO_RUN_FOR_TABLE)

mrk_for_run <- copy(mrk_for_run)
mrk_for_run[, MarkerIndex := seq_len(.N), by = .(Pop, File)]
mrk_for_run[, Chr := sub("\\.genotypes$", "", File)]

# Load SNP maps for all pops and attach marker index
snp_maps_all <- rbindlist(
  lapply(POPS, read_all_snp_maps_for_pop),
  use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE
)

if (is.null(snp_maps_all) || nrow(snp_maps_all) == 0) {
  stop("No SNP map files found under PopXX/AI2/", SNP_SUBDIR, " for POPS.")
}

snp_maps_all[, MarkerIndex := seq_len(.N), by = .(Pop, Chr)]

# Merge SNP metadata with marker metrics
marker_table <- merge(
  snp_maps_all,
  mrk_for_run,
  by = c("Pop", "Chr", "MarkerIndex"),
  all.x = TRUE,
  all.y = FALSE
)

keep_cols <- intersect(
  c("Pop","PopNum","Chr","Pos","SNP_ID","A1","A2",
    "Subgenome","Thinning","File","MarkerIndex",
    "MAF","Het","Missing"),
  names(marker_table)
)

marker_table <- marker_table[, ..keep_cols]

marker_table[, Matched := !is.na(Het)]
message("[ADD-ON] Marker table rows: ", nrow(marker_table))
message("[ADD-ON] Matched to metrics: ", sum(marker_table$Matched), " (",
        round(100 * mean(marker_table$Matched), 2), "%)")

# write table
fwrite(marker_table, OUT_MARKER_TABLE, sep = "\t")
message("[ADD-ON] Wrote: ", OUT_MARKER_TABLE)

# Optional (uncomment):  write a problem markers subset for inspection
# hihet <- marker_table[!is.na(Het) & Het >= 0.5]
# fwrite(hihet, file.path(OUTDIR, paste0("marker_hihet_", GENO_RUN_FOR_TABLE, ".tsv")), sep="\t")


```

```{r}

##############################################
## Identify drivers of residual heterozygosity
##############################################

# Quantify per-marker heterozygosity and missingness, markers with highest heterozygosity per chr, bin level summaries of het/miss along the chromosome

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# ===================== EDIT =====================
ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POPS <- c(30,32,34,41,42,46,80)

RUNS <- c("runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")
SNP_DIR_FROM_RUN <- function(run) sub("^runs", "snp", run)

# Marker QC thresholds used for top markers outputs
TOP_N_MARKERS <- 200L
HET_FLAG      <- 0.25   # adjust if desired
BIN_SIZE_BP   <- 1e6    # 1 Mb bins

OUTDIR <- file.path(ROOT, "AI2_het_drivers_marker_region_qc")
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# ---------- HELPERS ----------
infer_chr <- function(path) str_match(path, "(chr[1-7][ABD])")[,2]

read_snp_map <- function(f_snp, chr_fallback = NA_character_) {
  if (!file.exists(f_snp)) stop("Missing SNP map: ", f_snp)

  dt <- fread(f_snp, header = TRUE, sep = "\t", data.table = TRUE, showProgress = FALSE)
  if (ncol(dt) == 1L) {
    dt <- fread(f_snp, header = FALSE, sep = "", data.table = TRUE, showProgress = FALSE)
  }

  nms <- names(dt)
  nms_low <- tolower(nms)

  pick <- function(cands) {
    idx <- match(tolower(cands), nms_low)
    idx <- idx[!is.na(idx)]
    if (length(idx)) nms[idx[1]] else NA_character_
  }

  col_marker <- pick(c("marker","snp","rsid","id","name"))
  col_chr    <- pick(c("chr","chrom","chromosome"))
  col_pos    <- pick(c("pos","bp","position","physical_position","physpos"))

  if (is.na(col_marker) || is.na(col_pos)) {
    if (all(grepl("^V[0-9]+$", names(dt)))) {
      setnames(dt, names(dt), paste0("V", seq_len(ncol(dt))))
    }
    if (ncol(dt) >= 3L) {
      col_marker <- if (is.na(col_marker)) names(dt)[1] else col_marker
      col_chr    <- if (is.na(col_chr))    names(dt)[2] else col_chr
      col_pos    <- if (is.na(col_pos))    names(dt)[3] else col_pos
    } else {
      stop("Cannot parse SNP map columns (need >=3 cols): ", f_snp)
    }
  }

  out <- data.table(
    Marker = as.character(dt[[col_marker]]),
    Chr    = if (!is.na(col_chr)) as.character(dt[[col_chr]]) else chr_fallback,
    Pos    = suppressWarnings(as.integer(dt[[col_pos]]))
  )

  out[, MarkerIndex := .I]
  out
}

# Compute per-marker het/missingness on WIL rows only
marker_metrics_from_geno <- function(Gwil) {
  if (!is.matrix(Gwil)) Gwil <- as.matrix(Gwil)
  if (nrow(Gwil) < 1L || ncol(Gwil) < 1L) return(NULL)

  called <- !is.na(Gwil) & ((Gwil == 0L) | (Gwil == 1L) | (Gwil == 2L))
  n_called <- colSums(called)

  # genotype class counts across WILs
  n1 <- colSums(Gwil == 1L, na.rm = TRUE)
  n0 <- colSums(Gwil == 0L, na.rm = TRUE)
  n2 <- colSums(Gwil == 2L, na.rm = TRUE)

  # total WILs per marker
  n_total <- ncol(Gwil) * 0L
  n_total <- rep.int(nrow(Gwil), ncol(Gwil))
  n_na <- n_total - (n0 + n1 + n2)

  # het rate among called genotypes; missing rate among all WILs
  het_rate  <- ifelse(n_called > 0, n1 / n_called, NA_real_)
  miss_rate <- ifelse(n_total > 0, n_na / n_total, NA_real_)

  data.table(
    MarkerIndex = seq_len(ncol(Gwil)),
    N0 = n0, N1 = n1, N2 = n2,
    Ncalled = n_called,
    Nmissing = n_na,
    HetRate = het_rate,
    MissRate = miss_rate
  )
}

# Find genotype files
find_geno_files <- function(pop, run) {
  base <- file.path(ROOT, paste0("Pop", pop), "AI2", run)
  if (!dir.exists(base)) return(character())
  list.files(base, pattern = "\\.genotypes$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
}

snp_map_path <- function(pop, run, chr) {
  snp_dir <- file.path(ROOT, paste0("Pop", pop), "AI2", SNP_DIR_FROM_RUN(run))
  file.path(snp_dir, paste0(chr, "_Pop", pop, ".markers.snp"))
}

# ---------- Main ----------
all_marker_qc <- list()
all_bin_qc    <- list()
all_top_qc    <- list()

for (pop in POPS) {
  for (run in RUNS) {
    geno_files <- find_geno_files(pop, run)
    if (!length(geno_files)) next
    message("Pop", pop, " / ", run, " : ", length(geno_files), " genotype files")

    for (fg in geno_files) {
      chr <- infer_chr(fg)
      if (is.na(chr)) next

      # Read genotype file
      dt <- fread(fg, header = FALSE, showProgress = FALSE)
      ids <- dt[[1]]

      wil_idx <- grepl(paste0("^WIL", pop, "\\."), ids)
      if (!any(wil_idx)) next

      # Genotype matrix
      G <- as.matrix(dt[wil_idx, -1, with = FALSE])
      storage.mode(G) <- "integer"
      G[G == 9L] <- NA_integer_

      if (!is.matrix(G)) G <- as.matrix(G)

      # Compute per-marker het/missingness on WILs
      mm <- marker_metrics_from_geno(G)
      if (is.null(mm)) next

      # Attach SNP map by marker index
      fsnp <- snp_map_path(pop, run, chr)
      smap <- read_snp_map(fsnp, chr_fallback = chr)

      nG <- ncol(G)
      nM <- nrow(smap)
      if (nG != nM) {
        warning("Marker count mismatch: ", basename(fg),
                " | genotypes ncol=", nG, " | snp map nrow=", nM,
                " | using min(n) to merge.")
        nmin <- min(nG, nM)
        mm   <- mm[MarkerIndex <= nmin]
        smap <- smap[MarkerIndex <= nmin]
      }

      qc <- cbind(mm, smap[, .(Marker, Chr, Pos)])
      qc[, `:=`(
        Pop = paste0("Pop", pop),
        Thinning = run,
        GenoFile = basename(fg),
        Chr_file = chr,
        Subgenome = substr(chr, nchar(chr), nchar(chr))
      )]

      # Write per-file marker QC
      out_marker_dir <- file.path(OUTDIR, "per_file_marker_qc", paste0("Pop", pop), run, chr)
      dir.create(out_marker_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

      fwrite(qc,
             file.path(out_marker_dir, paste0(chr, "_Pop", pop, "_marker_qc.tsv")),
             sep = "\t")

      # Top-het markers per file
      top <- qc[order(-HetRate)][1:min(TOP_N_MARKERS, .N)]
      fwrite(top,
             file.path(out_marker_dir, paste0(chr, "_Pop", pop, "_topHet_markers.tsv")),
             sep = "\t")

      # Bin by position (1 Mb bins)
      if (!all(is.na(qc$Pos))) {
        qc[, BinStart := as.integer(floor(Pos / BIN_SIZE_BP) * BIN_SIZE_BP)]
        # Bin-level summaries
        # - MeanHet / MeanMiss: average marker het/miss in the bin
        # - FracHet_gt_flag: fraction of markers with HetRate > HET_FLAG
        bins <- qc[, .(
          N_markers = .N,
          MeanHet = mean(HetRate, na.rm = TRUE),
          MeanMiss = mean(MissRate, na.rm = TRUE),
          FracHet_gt_flag = mean(HetRate > HET_FLAG, na.rm = TRUE)
        ), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Chr_file, Subgenome, BinStart)][order(Pop, Thinning, Chr_file, BinStart)]

        fwrite(bins,
               file.path(out_marker_dir, paste0(chr, "_Pop", pop, "_het_bins_", as.integer(BIN_SIZE_BP), "bp.tsv")),
               sep = "\t")

        all_bin_qc[[length(all_bin_qc) + 1L]] <- bins
      }

      all_marker_qc[[length(all_marker_qc) + 1L]] <- qc
      all_top_qc[[length(all_top_qc) + 1L]] <- top
    }
  }
}

marker_all <- rbindlist(all_marker_qc, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
bins_all   <- rbindlist(all_bin_qc,    use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)
top_all    <- rbindlist(all_top_qc,    use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

fwrite(marker_all, file.path(OUTDIR, "ALL_marker_qc.tsv"), sep = "\t")
if (nrow(bins_all)) fwrite(bins_all, file.path(OUTDIR, "ALL_het_bins.tsv"), sep = "\t")
fwrite(top_all, file.path(OUTDIR, "ALL_topHet_markers.tsv"), sep = "\t")

worst_summary <- marker_all[, .(
  N_markers = .N,
  MeanHet = mean(HetRate, na.rm = TRUE),
  P99Het  = quantile(HetRate, probs = 0.99, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE),
  N_Het_gt_flag = sum(HetRate > HET_FLAG, na.rm = TRUE)
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)][order(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)]

fwrite(worst_summary, file.path(OUTDIR, "SUMMARY_marker_het_overview.tsv"), sep = "\t")

message("DONE. Outputs written under: ", OUTDIR)

```

```{r}

#####################################
## Population averaged heterozygosity
#####################################

# For each population, plot genome wide marker level heterozygosity, faceted by chromosome

# ================= EDIT THESE =================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POP        <- 34
RUNS_TAG   <- "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed"
SNP_TAG    <- "snp"    # corresponding marker map folder

OUT_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2", "plots_population", RUNS_TAG)
FILETYPE <- "png" 
WIDTH    <- 14
HEIGHT   <- 8
DPI      <- 300

DRAW_TILES <- TRUE

CHRS <- c("chr1A","chr1B","chr1D",
          "chr2A","chr2B","chr2D",
          "chr3A","chr3B","chr3D",
          "chr4A","chr4B","chr4D",
          "chr5A","chr5B","chr5D",
          "chr6A","chr6B","chr6D",
          "chr7A","chr7B","chr7D")

CEN_MB <- c(
  chr1A=211.5, chr1B=241.7, chr1D=169.7,
  chr2A=340.9, chr2B=348.9, chr2D=266.5,
  chr3A=318.8, chr3B=348.7, chr3D=240.5,
  chr4A=266.1, chr4B=318.8, chr4D=185.2,
  chr5A=253.0, chr5B=200.8, chr5D=187.6,
  chr6A=287.1, chr6B=324.7, chr6D=215.4,
  chr7A=361.9, chr7B=309.1, chr7D=338.2
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(RColorBrewer)
})

POP_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2")
RUNS_DIR <- file.path(POP_DIR, RUNS_TAG)
SNP_DIR  <- file.path(POP_DIR, SNP_TAG)

if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

save_plot <- function(p, out_path) {
  if (tolower(FILETYPE) == "png") {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, dpi = DPI, device = "png", limitsize = FALSE)
  } else {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, device = "pdf", limitsize = FALSE)
  }
}

# Rread marker map: must contain a physical position column (bp)
read_markers_map <- function(f) {
  m <- fread(f, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = TRUE, showProgress = FALSE)

  pos_col <- intersect(names(m), c("Pos", "POS", "pos", "Position", "BP", "bp", "PhysicalPosition", "physical_position"))
  if (length(pos_col) < 1) {
    stop("Could not find a position column in: ", f, "\nColumns: ", paste(names(m), collapse = ", "))
  }
  if (pos_col[1] != "pos_bp") setnames(m, pos_col[1], "pos_bp")

  m[, pos_bp := as.numeric(pos_bp)]
  m
}

# Compute marker-level mean het for this chromosome
compute_chr_marker_mean_het <- function(chr) {

  geno_file <- file.path(RUNS_DIR, chr, sprintf("%s.genotypes", chr))
  map_file  <- file.path(SNP_DIR,  sprintf("%s_Pop%d.markers.snp", chr, POP))

  if (!file.exists(geno_file)) return(NULL)
  if (!file.exists(map_file))  stop("Missing SNP map for ", chr, ": ", map_file)

  G <- fread(geno_file, sep = "\t", header = FALSE, data.table = TRUE, showProgress = FALSE)

  wil_pat <- paste0("^WIL", POP, "\\.")
  G <- G[grepl(wil_pat, V1)]
  if (!nrow(G)) return(NULL)

  X <- as.matrix(G[, -1])

  callable <- (X == 0L) | (X == 1L) | (X == 2L)
  het      <- (X == 1L)

  n_call <- colSums(callable)
  n_het  <- colSums(het)
  mean_het <- ifelse(n_call > 0, n_het / n_call, NA_real_)

  M <- read_markers_map(map_file)

  if (nrow(M) != length(mean_het)) {
    stop(
      "Marker count mismatch for ", chr, " Pop", POP, "\n",
      "  map rows: ", nrow(M), "\n",
      "  genotype marker cols: ", length(mean_het), "\n",
      "Map file: ", map_file, "\nGeno file: ", geno_file
    )
  }

  dt <- data.table(
    Chrom = chr,
    pos_bp = M$pos_bp,
    PositionMb = M$pos_bp / 1e6,
    HetMean = pmin(1, pmax(0, mean_het)),
    N_called = n_call
  )

  setorder(dt, pos_bp)

  if (isTRUE(DRAW_TILES)) {
    x <- dt$PositionMb
    if (length(x) >= 2) {
      mid <- (x[-1] + x[-length(x)]) / 2
      xmin <- c(x[1] - (mid[1] - x[1]), mid)
      xmax <- c(mid, x[length(x)] + (x[length(x)] - mid[length(mid)]))
      dt[, `:=`(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax)]
    } else {
      dt[, `:=`(xmin = x - 0.01, xmax = x + 0.01)]
    }
    dt[, `:=`(ymin = 0, ymax = 1)]
  }

  max_called <- max(dt$N_called, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(max_called) && max_called > 0) {
    dt[, alpha := 0.25 + 0.75 * (N_called / max_called)]
  } else {
    dt[, alpha := 1]
  }

  dt[]
}

# Collect all chromosomes
dt_list <- lapply(CHRS, compute_chr_marker_mean_het)
dt_all  <- rbindlist(dt_list, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

if (!nrow(dt_all)) stop("No genotype/map data found for Pop", POP, " under ", RUNS_DIR)

dt_all[, Chrom := factor(Chrom, levels = CHRS)]

# Centromeres
cen_df <- data.frame(
  Chrom = factor(names(CEN_MB), levels = CHRS),
  CenMb = as.numeric(CEN_MB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

pal <- brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
col_cen <- pal[4]

# Plot
p <- ggplot() +
  (if (isTRUE(DRAW_TILES))
     geom_rect(
       data = dt_all,
       aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax,
           fill = HetMean, alpha = alpha),
       color = NA
     ) else NULL) +
  geom_point(
    data = dt_all,
    aes(x = PositionMb, y = HetMean),
    size = 0.55, stroke = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.85
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    data = cen_df,
    aes(xintercept = CenMb),
    color = col_cen, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Chrom, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    name   = "Mean heterozygosity",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    low    = "white",
    high   = "#d95f02",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  guides(alpha = "none") +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Population ", POP, " mean heterozygosity signal (", RUNS_TAG, ")"),
    x = "Position (Mb)",
    y = "Mean heterozygosity"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

out_path <- file.path(
  OUT_DIR,
  paste0("population_mean_heterozygosity_markerlevel_", RUNS_TAG, "_Pop", POP, ".", FILETYPE)
)
save_plot(p, out_path)
message("[population het] wrote: ", out_path)

```

```{r}

########################################################################
## Recompute donor proportions in the same way as done during imputation
########################################################################

# Outputs:
# - per_individual_chr_counts
#   one row per WIL x chr with number of informative markers, used nonmissing markers, donor allele totals calculated including and excluding heterozygotes 
# - per_individual_subgenome
#   aggregates chromosome rows into per WIL x subgenome donor props, weighted by number of used markers
# - population_subgenome_summary
#   pop x subgenome mean and StdDev across WILs

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POPS <- c(30,32,34,41,42,46,80)
RUNS <- c("runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")

OUTDIR <- file.path(ROOT, "AI2_donorprops_R_AWK_exact_l1_smoothed")
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Parent map
parent_map <- list(
  "30_AB"=c(REC="RP2", DON="WE30"),
  "30_D" =c(REC="RP2", DON="TA2"),
  "32_AB"=c(REC="RP2", DON="WE32"),
  "32_D" =c(REC="RP2", DON="TA2"),
  "34_AB"=c(REC="RP2", DON="WE34"),
  "34_D" =c(REC="RP2", DON="TA2"),
  "41_AB"=c(REC="RP1", DON="WE41"),
  "41_D" =c(REC="RP1", DON="TA2"),
  "42_AB"=c(REC="RP1", DON="WE42"),
  "42_D" =c(REC="RP1", DON="TA2"),
  "46_AB"=c(REC="RP1", DON="WE46"),
  "46_D" =c(REC="RP1", DON="TA2"),
  "80_AB"=c(REC="RP1", DON="WE80"),
  "80_D" =c(REC="RP1", DON="TA1")
)

infer_chr <- function(f) {
  m <- str_match(f, "(chr[1-7][ABD])")[,2]
  if (length(m) == 0) NA_character_ else m
}
infer_subkey <- function(chr) if (str_ends(chr, "D")) "D" else "AB"

force_mat <- function(x, nrow = NULL) {
  if (is.null(dim(x))) {
    if (is.null(nrow)) nrow <- 1L
    x <- matrix(x, nrow = nrow)
  }
  x
}

# Outputs data table with one row per WIL containing N_informative_markers, Used_inclHets, DonorAlleles_inclHets, Used_exclHets, DonorAlleles_exclHets
compute_chr_counts <- function(Gwil, rec, don) {
  Gwil <- force_mat(Gwil)
  rec  <- as.integer(rec)
  don  <- as.integer(don)

  # informative markers
  informative <- ((rec == 0L) | (rec == 2L)) &
                 ((don == 0L) | (don == 2L)) &
                 (rec != don)

  if (!any(informative)) return(NULL)

  # If donor is 2, donor allele count = g (0/1/2)
  # If donor is 0, donor allele count = 2 - g
  donor_is_2 <- (don[informative] == 2L)

  Gsub <- Gwil[, informative, drop = FALSE]
  Gsub <- force_mat(Gsub, nrow = nrow(Gwil))

  called <- (!is.na(Gsub)) & ((Gsub == 0L) | (Gsub == 1L) | (Gsub == 2L))
  called <- force_mat(called, nrow = nrow(Gsub))
  used_incl <- rowSums(called)

  # donor allele counts (hets included)
  D <- Gsub
  D <- force_mat(D, nrow = nrow(Gsub))

  # flip columns where donor allele is 0 (so donor allele count = 2-g)
  if (any(!donor_is_2)) {
    idx_flip <- which(!donor_is_2)
    D[, idx_flip] <- 2L - D[, idx_flip, drop = FALSE]
  }

  D[!called] <- 0L
  donor_alleles_incl <- rowSums(D)

  # donor allele counts (hets excluded): use only homozygotes (0/2)
  hom <- (!is.na(Gsub)) & ((Gsub == 0L) | (Gsub == 2L))
  hom <- force_mat(hom, nrow = nrow(Gsub))
  used_excl <- rowSums(hom)

  donor_hom <- matrix(FALSE, nrow = nrow(Gsub), ncol = ncol(Gsub))

  if (any(donor_is_2)) {
    idx2 <- which(donor_is_2)
    donor_hom[, idx2] <- (Gsub[, idx2, drop = FALSE] == 2L)
  }
  if (any(!donor_is_2)) {
    idx0 <- which(!donor_is_2)
    donor_hom[, idx0] <- (Gsub[, idx0, drop = FALSE] == 0L)
  }

  donor_hom <- donor_hom & hom
  donor_alleles_excl <- 2L * rowSums(donor_hom)

  data.table(
    N_informative_markers = as.integer(sum(informative)),
    Used_inclHets = as.integer(used_incl),
    DonorAlleles_inclHets = as.integer(donor_alleles_incl),
    Used_exclHets = as.integer(used_excl),
    DonorAlleles_exclHets = as.integer(donor_alleles_excl)
  )
}

rows <- list()

for (pop in POPS) {
  for (run in RUNS) {

    base <- file.path(ROOT, paste0("Pop", pop), "AI2", run)
    if (!dir.exists(base)) next

    files <- list.files(base, pattern = "\\.genotypes$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
    if (!length(files)) next

    message("Pop", pop, " / ", run, " : ", length(files), " files")

    for (f in files) {
      chr <- infer_chr(f)
      if (is.na(chr)) next

      subkey <- infer_subkey(chr)
      pm <- parent_map[[paste0(pop, "_", subkey)]]
      if (is.null(pm)) next

      dt <- fread(f, header = FALSE, showProgress = FALSE)
      ids <- dt[[1]]

      rec_i <- which(ids == pm["REC"])
      don_i <- which(ids == pm["DON"])
      wil_i <- which(grepl(paste0("^WIL", pop, "\\."), ids))

      if (!length(rec_i) || !length(don_i) || !length(wil_i)) next

      G <- as.matrix(dt[, -1, with = FALSE])
      storage.mode(G) <- "integer"
      G[G == 9L] <- NA_integer_

      rec <- G[rec_i, , drop = TRUE]
      don <- G[don_i, , drop = TRUE]
      Gwil <- G[wil_i, , drop = FALSE]

      chr_dt <- compute_chr_counts(Gwil, rec, don)
      if (is.null(chr_dt)) next

      chr_dt[, `:=`(
        ID = ids[wil_i],
        Pop = paste0("Pop", pop),
```
