```{r}
        Thinning = run,
        Chr = chr,
        Subgenome = substr(chr, nchar(chr), nchar(chr))
      )]

      rows[[length(rows) + 1L]] <- chr_dt
    }
  }
}

chr_dt <- rbindlist(rows, use.names = TRUE, fill = TRUE)

# Write per-WIL x chromosome
fwrite(chr_dt, file.path(OUTDIR, "per_individual_chr_counts.tsv"), sep = "\t")

perIL_sub <- chr_dt[, .(
  N_chr = .N,

  N_used_total_incl = sum(Used_inclHets, na.rm = TRUE),
  DonorProp_inclHets = {
    denom <- sum(Used_inclHets, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (denom > 0) sum(DonorAlleles_inclHets, na.rm = TRUE) / (2 * denom) else NA_real_
  },

  N_used_total_excl = sum(Used_exclHets, na.rm = TRUE),
  DonorProp_exclHets = {
    denom <- sum(Used_exclHets, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (denom > 0) sum(DonorAlleles_exclHets, na.rm = TRUE) / (2 * denom) else NA_real_
  }
), by = .(ID, Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)][order(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome, ID)]

fwrite(perIL_sub, file.path(OUTDIR, "per_individual_subgenome.tsv"), sep = "\t")

# Population summary: mean & SD over individuals
pop_sub <- perIL_sub[, .(
  N_individuals = uniqueN(ID),

  MeanDonorProp_inclHets = mean(DonorProp_inclHets, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDDonorProp_inclHets   = sd(DonorProp_inclHets, na.rm = TRUE),

  MeanDonorProp_exclHets = mean(DonorProp_exclHets, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDDonorProp_exclHets   = sd(DonorProp_exclHets, na.rm = TRUE),

  MeanUsed_incl = mean(N_used_total_incl, na.rm = TRUE),
  MeanUsed_excl = mean(N_used_total_excl, na.rm = TRUE),
  N_NA_incl = sum(is.na(DonorProp_inclHets)),
  N_NA_excl = sum(is.na(DonorProp_exclHets))
), by = .(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)][order(Pop, Thinning, Subgenome)]

fwrite(pop_sub, file.path(OUTDIR, "population_subgenome_summary.tsv"), sep = "\t")

message("DONE. Wrote outputs to: ", OUTDIR)

```

```{r}

############################################################
### Proportion of WILs with introgressions by chromosome arm
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# =================== EDIT PATHS ===================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"

# File produced by donor prop script
WIL_FP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly/AI2_donorprops_R_AWK_exact_l1_smoothed/per_individual_subgenome.tsv"
# ==================================================

# Output directory (must match segment aggregation script)
OUTDIR <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, "AI2_aggregates_allparams")
dir.create(OUTDIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

MASTER_FP <- file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_master.tsv")
if (!file.exists(MASTER_FP)) {
  stop("Missing segments_master.tsv at: ", MASTER_FP,
       "\nRun your segment aggregation script first, or point MASTER_FP to the correct file.")
}
if (!file.exists(WIL_FP)) {
  stop("Missing per_individual_subgenome.tsv at: ", WIL_FP,
       "\nPoint WIL_FP to the correct file produced by your donor-prop script.")
}

# Centromere positions (Mb) used to split each chr into arms
# arm assignment is whether a segment lies entirely before CenMB (S) or entirely after CenMb (L); if it spans CenMb, counts as both and contributes to both S and L
CEN_MB <- c(
  chr1A=211.5, chr1B=241.7, chr1D=169.7,
  chr2A=340.9, chr2B=348.9, chr2D=266.5,
  chr3A=318.8, chr3B=348.7, chr3D=240.5,
  chr4A=266.1, chr4B=318.8, chr4D=185.2,
  chr5A=253.0, chr5B=200.8, chr5D=187.6,
  chr6A=287.1, chr6B=324.7, chr6D=215.4,
  chr7A=361.9, chr7B=309.1, chr7D=338.2
)

# ---------- HELPERS ----------
norm_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- sub("^chr", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x
}

# ---------- Load inputs ----------
# wil: per WIL donor prop table only used to count total WILs per pop
seg <- fread(MASTER_FP, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = TRUE)
wil <- fread(WIL_FP, sep = "\t", header = TRUE, data.table = TRUE)

# Ensure required columns exist
need_seg <- c("Pop","Acc","Chr","Start","End","Method")
miss_seg <- setdiff(need_seg, names(seg))
if (length(miss_seg)) stop("segments_master.tsv missing columns: ", paste(miss_seg, collapse = ", "))

need_wil <- c("ID","Pop")
miss_wil <- setdiff(need_wil, names(wil))
if (length(miss_wil)) stop("per_individual_subgenome.tsv missing columns: ", paste(miss_wil, collapse = ", "))

seg[, Pop := as.integer(Pop)]

wil[, Pop := as.integer(sub("^Pop", "", as.character(Pop)))]

# Denominator per population
denom <- wil[, .(n_total_lines = uniqueN(ID)), by = .(Pop)]

seg[, Chr := norm_chr(Chr)]
seg[, `:=`(
  StartMb = as.numeric(Start) / 1e6,
  EndMb   = as.numeric(End)   / 1e6
)]

cen_dt <- data.table(
  Chr = norm_chr(names(CEN_MB)),
  CenMb = as.numeric(CEN_MB)
)

seg <- merge(seg, cen_dt, by = "Chr", all.x = TRUE)
if (any(is.na(seg$CenMb))) {
  miss <- unique(seg[is.na(CenMb), Chr])
  stop("Missing centromere midpoint for: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))
}

seg[, Arm := fifelse(
  EndMb < CenMb, "S",
  fifelse(StartMb > CenMb, "L", "Both")
)]

seg_arm <- rbindlist(list(
  seg[Arm %in% c("S","L"), .(Pop, Method, Acc, Chr, Arm)],
  seg[Arm == "Both", .(Pop, Method, Acc, Chr, Arm = "S")],
  seg[Arm == "Both", .(Pop, Method, Acc, Chr, Arm = "L")]
), use.names = TRUE)

# Numerator: unique WILs with at least 1 segment on that arm
num <- seg_arm[, .(n_lines_with_introgression = uniqueN(Acc)),
               by = .(Pop, Method, Chr, Arm)]

grid <- CJ(
  Pop = sort(unique(denom$Pop)),
  Method = sort(unique(seg$Method)),
  Chr = sort(unique(seg$Chr)),
  Arm = c("S","L"),
  unique = TRUE
)

out <- merge(grid, num, by = c("Pop","Method","Chr","Arm"), all.x = TRUE)
out[is.na(n_lines_with_introgression), n_lines_with_introgression := 0L]

out <- merge(out, denom, by = "Pop", all.x = TRUE)
# Proportion: numerator/denominator 
out[, prop_lines_with_introgression := fifelse(
  n_total_lines > 0, n_lines_with_introgression / n_total_lines, NA_real_
)]

setorder(out, Pop, Method, Chr, Arm)

# Write final output table
OUT_FP <- file.path(OUTDIR, "segments_prop_lines_with_introgression_by_arm_and_method.tsv")
fwrite(out, OUT_FP, sep = "\t")

cat("\n[OK] Wrote: ", OUT_FP, "\n", sep = "")

```

```{r}

####################################################################
## Plot segment lengths in Mb and as proportion of chromosome length
####################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(stringr)
  library(readr)
})

# =================== EDIT PATHS ===================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
# Directory created during segment aggregation
AGG_DIR    <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, "AI2_aggregates_allparams")
MASTER_FP  <- file.path(AGG_DIR, "segments_master.tsv")

OUT_DIR <- file.path(AGG_DIR, "plots_segment_lengths_k10-5_k40-20_th10-0.9_th40-0.7")
dir.create(OUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# What MA method to use for segment plotting
METHOD_KEEP <- "k10-5_k40-20_th10-0.9_th40-0.7"
# =================================================

stopifnot(file.exists(MASTER_FP))
seg <- fread(MASTER_FP)

# Filter to one segment calling method
df <- seg %>%
  filter(Method == METHOD_KEEP)

if (nrow(df) == 0) {
  stop("No segments found for Method == ", METHOD_KEEP, " in: ", MASTER_FP)
}

# Chromosome lengths (Mb) used to convert segment lengths into proportions of chromosome length
chr_lengths <- tibble::tibble(
  Chr = c("1A","2A","3A","4A","5A","6A","7A",
          "1B","2B","3B","4B","5B","6B","7B",
          "1D","2D","3D","4D","5D","6D","7D"),
  ChrLengthMb = c(
    594.102, 780.799, 750.844, 744.588, 709.774, 618.079, 736.706,
    689.852, 801.257, 830.830, 673.617, 713.150, 720.988, 750.620,
    495.453, 651.853, 615.552, 509.857, 566.081, 473.593, 638.686
  )
)

# Ensure expected columns exist
need <- c("Pop","Acc","Chr","Start","End","LengthMb")
miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
if (length(miss)) stop("segments_master.tsv missing required columns: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Chr = gsub("^chr", "", Chr, ignore.case = TRUE),
    Pop = factor(Pop, levels = sort(unique(Pop))),
    LengthMb = ifelse(is.na(LengthMb) & !is.na(Start) & !is.na(End),
                      (as.numeric(End) - as.numeric(Start)) / 1e6, as.numeric(LengthMb))
  ) %>%
  left_join(chr_lengths, by = "Chr") %>%
  mutate(PropChr = LengthMb / ChrLengthMb)

if (any(is.na(df$ChrLengthMb))) {
  bad <- unique(df$Chr[is.na(df$ChrLengthMb)])
  stop("Missing chromosome lengths for: ", paste(bad, collapse = ", "))
}

# Summary HELPER
# Returns number of segments, number of unique accessions contributing segments, mean/median length in Mb, mean/median length as proportion of chromosome
summarize_lengths <- function(data) {
  dplyr::summarise(
    data,
    n_segments      = dplyr::n(),
    n_unique_Acc    = dplyr::n_distinct(Acc),
    mean_lengthMb   = mean(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_lengthMb = stats::median(LengthMb, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_propChr    = mean(PropChr, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_propChr  = stats::median(PropChr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
}

summary_overall <- summarize_lengths(df)

summary_by_chrom <- df %>%
  group_by(Chr) %>%
  summarize_lengths() %>%
  arrange(Chr)

summary_by_pop <- df %>%
  group_by(Pop) %>%
  summarize_lengths() %>%
  arrange(Pop)

summary_by_pop_chrom <- df %>%
  group_by(Pop, Chr) %>%
  summarize_lengths() %>%
  arrange(Pop, Chr)

# Write CSVs
readr::write_csv(summary_overall,      file.path(OUT_DIR, "segments_summary_overall.csv"))
readr::write_csv(summary_by_chrom,     file.path(OUT_DIR, "segments_summary_by_chrom.csv"))
readr::write_csv(summary_by_pop,       file.path(OUT_DIR, "segments_summary_by_pop.csv"))
readr::write_csv(summary_by_pop_chrom, file.path(OUT_DIR, "segments_summary_by_pop_chrom.csv"))

# Population color palette
pop_cols <- c(
  `30` = "#a6761d",
  `32` = "#1b9e77",
  `34` = "#d95f02",
  `41` = "#7570b3",
  `42` = "#e7298a",
  `46` = "#66a61e",
  `80` = "#e6ab02"
)
pop_cols <- pop_cols[names(pop_cols) %in% levels(df$Pop)]

# Per-pop facets: Length (Mb)
p_len_facets <- ggplot(df, aes(x = LengthMb, fill = Pop)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10, color = "black", alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Pop, nrow = 2, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pop_cols, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Introgression length (Mb)",
    y = "Segment count"
  )

# Per-pop facets: Proportion of chromosome
p_prop_facets <- ggplot(df, aes(x = PropChr, fill = Pop)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02, color = "black", alpha = 0.85, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ Pop, nrow = 2, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pop_cols, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Introgression length (proportion of chromosome)",
    y = "Segment count"
  )

# All populations combined
p_len_all <- ggplot(df, aes(x = LengthMb)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 10, color = "black", fill = "grey70") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Introgression length (Mb)",
    y = "Segment count"
  )

p_prop_all <- ggplot(df, aes(x = PropChr)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.02, color = "black", fill = "grey70") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    x = "Introgression length (proportion of chromosome)",
    y = "Segment count"
  )

# Save
ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "perpop_lengths_mb.png"),   p_len_facets,  width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "perpop_lengths_prop.png"), p_prop_facets, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "allpops_lengths_mb.png"),  p_len_all,     width = 7,  height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR, "allpops_lengths_prop.png"),p_prop_all,    width = 7,  height = 5, dpi = 300)

# Print file locations to logs
cat("\n[OK] Wrote plots + summaries to:\n", OUT_DIR, "\n", sep = "")

```

```{r}

########################################
## Population-averaged donor proportions
########################################

# Visualize introgression signal by population along each chromosome 

# ================= EDIT THESE =================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POP        <- 34
METHOD_TAG <- "k10-5_k40-20_th10-0.9_th40-0.7"  # must match smoothing/segments tag

OUT_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2", "plots_population", METHOD_TAG)
FILETYPE <- "png"
WIDTH    <- 14
HEIGHT   <- 8
DPI      <- 300


# Optional segment overlay
ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY <- TRUE

# How to build a population consensus segment from per-WIL segments:
CONSENSUS_BIN_MB     <- 1     # resolution to compute coverage along genome
CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL    <- 0.03  # call as population segment if >= this fraction of WILs have a segment covering bin
SEG_YMIN             <- 0.80  # vertical placement of overlay bars
SEG_YMAX             <- 1.00

# Optional domestication loci
ADD_DOM_LOCI      <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_LABELS  <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_BANDS   <- FALSE
SHOW_LOCI_TICKS   <- TRUE

# Loci are defined per chr as Mb intervals
DOM_LOCI <- data.frame(
  Chrom   = c("chr5A","chr3A","chr3B","chr2D", "chr2A", "chr2B"),
  StartMb = c(650,     65,      89,      21, 28, 38),
  EndMb   = c(651,     66,      90,      22, 35, 50),
  Name    = c("Q",     "BTR-A1","BTR-B1","Tg-D", "Tg-A", "Tg-B"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
LABEL_OFFSET_MB <- 0

CHRS <- c("chr1A","chr1B","chr1D",
          "chr2A","chr2B","chr2D",
          "chr3A","chr3B","chr3D",
          "chr4A","chr4B","chr4D",
          "chr5A","chr5B","chr5D",
          "chr6A","chr6B","chr6D",
          "chr7A","chr7B","chr7D")

# Centromere midpoints (Mb) to add vertical lines in plots
CEN_MB <- c(
  chr1A=211.5, chr1B=241.7, chr1D=169.7,
  chr2A=340.9, chr2B=348.9, chr2D=266.5,
  chr3A=318.8, chr3B=348.7, chr3D=240.5,
  chr4A=266.1, chr4B=318.8, chr4D=185.2,
  chr5A=253.0, chr5B=200.8, chr5D=187.6,
  chr6A=287.1, chr6B=324.7, chr6D=215.4,
  chr7A=361.9, chr7B=309.1, chr7D=338.2
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(RColorBrewer)
})

POP_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2")
RUNS_DIR <- file.path(POP_DIR, "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")

if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

read_tsv <- function(f) read.table(f, header=TRUE, sep="\t", quote="",
                                   comment.char="", stringsAsFactors=FALSE, check.names=FALSE)

save_plot <- function(p, out_path) {
  if (tolower(FILETYPE) == "png") {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, dpi = DPI, device = "png", limitsize = FALSE)
  } else {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, device = "pdf", limitsize = FALSE)
  }
}

# Collect bins_smooth
bin_files <- list.files(
  RUNS_DIR,
  pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_bins_smooth__", METHOD_TAG, "\\.tsv$"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

bin_files <- bin_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", bin_files)]
if (!length(bin_files)) stop("No bins_smooth files found for Pop", POP, " tag=", METHOD_TAG)

bins_list <- lapply(bin_files, function(f) {
  df <- read_tsv(f)
  need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End","WE_prop","Sites")
  miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
  if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
  df
})
bins_all <- do.call(rbind, bins_list)

chrom_to_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  ifelse(grepl("^chr", x, ignore.case=TRUE), x, paste0("chr", x))
}

bins_all$Start   <- as.integer(bins_all$Start)
bins_all$End     <- as.integer(bins_all$End)
bins_all$Sites   <- as.integer(bins_all$Sites)
bins_all$WE_prop <- pmin(1, pmax(0, as.numeric(bins_all$WE_prop)))
bins_all$Chrom   <- factor(chrom_to_chr(bins_all$Chrom), levels = CHRS)

# Compute population mean per bin
agg <- aggregate(
  WE_prop ~ Chrom + Start + End,
  data = bins_all,
  FUN = function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
)
names(agg)[names(agg) == "WE_prop"] <- "WE_mean"

contrib <- aggregate(
  WE_prop ~ Chrom + Start + End,
  data = bins_all,
  FUN = function(x) sum(!is.na(x))
)
names(contrib)[names(contrib) == "WE_prop"] <- "N_contrib"

agg_df <- merge(agg, contrib, by = c("Chrom","Start","End"), all.x = TRUE, sort = FALSE)
agg_df$alpha    <- with(agg_df, ifelse(max(N_contrib, na.rm=TRUE) > 0,
                                       0.3 + 0.7 * (N_contrib / max(N_contrib, na.rm=TRUE)), 1))
agg_df$CenterMb <- ((agg_df$Start + agg_df$End) / 2) / 1e6

# Build population consensus segments
pop_segs_df <- NULL

if (isTRUE(ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY)) {

  seg_files <- list.files(
    RUNS_DIR,
    pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_segments__", METHOD_TAG, "\\.tsv$"),
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  # find per chr segment tables
  seg_files <- seg_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", seg_files)]

  if (!length(seg_files)) {
    message("[segments overlay] No segment files found for Pop", POP, " tag=", METHOD_TAG,
            " -> overlay will be skipped.")
  } else {

    segs_list <- lapply(seg_files, function(f) {
      df <- read_tsv(f)
      # read segments, allowing empty files
      if (!nrow(df)) return(df)
      need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End")
      miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
      if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in segments file ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
      df
    })
    segs_all <- do.call(rbind, segs_list)

    if (nrow(segs_all)) {
      segs_all$Start <- as.integer(segs_all$Start)
      segs_all$End   <- as.integer(segs_all$End)
      segs_all$Chrom <- factor(chrom_to_chr(segs_all$Chrom), levels = CHRS)

      ILs <- sort(unique(bins_all$Acc))
      nIL <- length(ILs)

      bin_bp <- as.integer(CONSENSUS_BIN_MB * 1e6)

      # build consensus segments for a single chr
      build_consensus_chr <- function(chr_df, chr_name) {
        if (!nrow(chr_df)) return(NULL)

        max_end <- max(chr_df$End, na.rm=TRUE)
        starts  <- seq.int(0L, max_end, by = bin_bp)
        ends    <- pmin(starts + bin_bp - 1L, max_end)
        nb      <- length(starts)

        cov <- integer(nb)

        by_il <- split(chr_df, chr_df$Acc)
        for (acc in names(by_il)) {
          d <- by_il[[acc]]
          hit <- logical(nb)
          for (k in seq_len(nrow(d))) {
            s <- d$Start[k]; e <- d$End[k]
            i1 <- max(1L, floor(s / bin_bp) + 1L)
            i2 <- min(nb, floor(e / bin_bp) + 1L)
            if (i1 <= i2) hit[i1:i2] <- TRUE
          }
          cov[hit] <- cov[hit] + 1L
        }

        frac <- cov / nIL
        call <- frac >= CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL
        if (!any(call)) return(NULL)

        r <- rle(call)
        ends_r   <- cumsum(r$lengths)
        starts_r <- c(1, head(ends_r, -1) + 1)

        out <- list()
        for (j in seq_along(r$values)) {
          if (!r$values[j]) next
          i1 <- starts_r[j]; i2 <- ends_r[j]
          out[[length(out)+1L]] <- data.frame(
            Chrom = chr_name,
            Start = starts[i1],
            End   = ends[i2],
            FracIL = mean(frac[i1:i2], na.rm=TRUE),
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
          )
        }
        do.call(rbind, out)
      }

      pop_segs_list <- lapply(levels(segs_all$Chrom), function(ch) {
        dfc <- segs_all[segs_all$Chrom == ch & !is.na(segs_all$Chrom), , drop=FALSE]
        build_consensus_chr(dfc, ch)
      })
      pop_segs_df <- do.call(rbind, pop_segs_list)

      if (!is.null(pop_segs_df) && nrow(pop_segs_df)) {
        pop_segs_df$Chrom <- factor(pop_segs_df$Chrom, levels = CHRS)
        pop_segs_df$ymin  <- SEG_YMIN
        pop_segs_df$ymax  <- SEG_YMAX
      } else {
        pop_segs_df <- NULL
        message("[segments overlay] No consensus segments passed CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL = ", CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL)
      }
    } else {
      message("[segments overlay] Segment files exist but contain zero rows.")
    }
  }
}

# Domestication loci prep
dom_df <- NULL
labs_df <- NULL
if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) {
  dom_df <- DOM_LOCI
  dom_df$Chrom <- factor(dom_df$Chrom, levels = CHRS)
  dom_df$MidMb <- (dom_df$StartMb + dom_df$EndMb) / 2

  chr_maxMb <- aggregate(End ~ Chrom, data = agg_df, FUN = function(x) max(x, na.rm=TRUE) / 1e6)
  names(chr_maxMb)[2] <- "maxMb"

  labs_df <- merge(dom_df, chr_maxMb, by="Chrom", all.x=TRUE, sort=FALSE)
  labs_df$Xlab <- pmin(labs_df$EndMb + LABEL_OFFSET_MB, labs_df$maxMb - 1)
  labs_df$Ylab <- 0.7
}

# Centromeres
cen_df <- data.frame(
  Chrom = factor(names(CEN_MB), levels = CHRS),
  CenMb = as.numeric(CEN_MB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Palette to define centromere, segment, and domestication loci coloring
pal <- brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
col_cen  <- pal[4]
col_seg  <- pal[1]
col_loci <- pal[4]

# -------------------- Plot --------------------
p <- ggplot() +
  # Domestication loci
  { if (!is.null(dom_df) && nrow(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_BANDS))
      geom_rect(
        data = dom_df,
        aes(xmin = StartMb, xmax = EndMb, ymin = 0, ymax = 1),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        fill = col_loci, alpha = 0.12,
        color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.25
      ) else NULL } +
  geom_rect(
    data = agg_df,
    aes(xmin = Start/1e6, xmax = End/1e6, ymin = 0, ymax = 1,
        fill = WE_mean, alpha = alpha),
    color = NA
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = agg_df[order(agg_df$Chrom, agg_df$CenterMb), ],
    aes(x = CenterMb, y = WE_mean),
    size = 1.4, stroke = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.95
  ) +
  # OPTIONAL: population-consensus segments as top bars
  (if (!is.null(pop_segs_df) && nrow(pop_segs_df))
     geom_rect(
       data = pop_segs_df,
       aes(xmin = Start/1e6, xmax = End/1e6, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
       inherit.aes = FALSE,
       fill = NA, color = col_seg, linewidth = 0.7
     ) else NULL) +
  # OPTIONAL: locus midpoint ticks
  { if (!is.null(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_TICKS))
      geom_vline(
        data = dom_df,
        aes(xintercept = MidMb),
        color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
      ) else NULL } +
  # Centromeres
  geom_vline(
    data = cen_df,
    aes(xintercept = CenMb),
    color = col_cen, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  # OPTIONAL: loci labels
  { if (!is.null(labs_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_LABELS))
      geom_label(
        data = labs_df,
        aes(x = Xlab, y = Ylab, label = Name),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        size = 3,
        label.size = 0,
        fill = "white", alpha = 0.6,
        hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5
      ) else NULL } +
  facet_wrap(~ Chrom, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    name   = "Mean donor proportion",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    low    = "white",
    high   = "#7570b3",
    na.value = "grey90"
  ) +
  guides(alpha = "none") +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Population ", POP, " mean introgression signal"),
    x = "Position (Mb)",
    y = "Mean donor proportion"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.margin = margin(5.5, 5.5, 5.5, 5.5)  # leave room for labels above
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.08), clip = "off")  # allow labels above panel

out_path <- file.path(
  OUT_DIR,
  paste0("population_mean_introgressions_Pop", POP, "_", METHOD_TAG,
         if (isTRUE(ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY)) "_withConsensusSegments" else "",
         if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) "_withDomLoci" else "",
         ".", ifelse(tolower(FILETYPE)=="png","png","pdf"))
)
save_plot(p, out_path)
message("[population] wrote: ", out_path)


```

```{r}

#####################################################
## Compare population consensus segments by MA method
#####################################################

# ================= EDIT THESE =================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POP        <- 80 # population to visualize

# MA method tags to compage (must match suffix used in segment filename)
METHOD_TAGS <- c(
  "k10-1_k40-5_th10-0.9_th40-0.7",
  "k10-3_k40-10_th10-0.9_th40-0.7",
  "k10-5_k40-20_th10-0.9_th40-0.7",
  "k10-10_k40-30_th10-0.9_th40-0.7",
  "k10-25_k40-50_th10-0.9_th40-0.7"
)

# Labels for each method tag
METHOD_LABELS <- c(
  "MA2/MA10",
  "MA6/MA20",
  "MA10/MA40",
  "MA20/MA60",
  "MA50/MA100"
)

# Method colors (must match METHOD_LABELS exactly)
METHOD_COLORS <- c(
  "MA2/MA10"    = "#d95f02",
  "MA6/MA20"   = "#7570b3",
  "MA10/MA40"  = "#1b9e77",
  "MA20/MA60"  = "#e7298a",
  "MA50/MA100" = "#66a61e"
)

OUT_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2", "plots_population", "COMPARE_METHODS")
FILETYPE <- "png"
WIDTH    <- 14
HEIGHT   <- 9
DPI      <- 300

# Consensus segment calling
CONSENSUS_BIN_MB  <- 1
CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL <- 0.03

LANE_HEIGHT <- 0.50
LANE_GAP    <- 0.15

# Optional domestication loci
ADD_DOM_LOCI      <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_LABELS  <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_BANDS   <- FALSE
SHOW_LOCI_TICKS   <- TRUE

DOM_LOCI <- data.frame(
  Chrom   = c("chr5A","chr3A","chr3B","chr2D", "chr2A", "chr2B"),
  StartMb = c(650,     65,      89,      21, 28, 38),
  EndMb   = c(651,     66,      90,      22, 35, 50),
  Name    = c("Q",     "BTR-A1","BTR-B1","Tg-D", "Tg-A", "Tg-B"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
LABEL_OFFSET_MB <- 0

X_TICK_MB <- 200 # tick spacing per facet in Mb

CHRS <- c("chr1A","chr1B","chr1D",
          "chr2A","chr2B","chr2D",
          "chr3A","chr3B","chr3D",
          "chr4A","chr4B","chr4D",
          "chr5A","chr5B","chr5D",
          "chr6A","chr6B","chr6D",
          "chr7A","chr7B","chr7D")

CEN_MB <- c(
  chr1A=211.5, chr1B=241.7, chr1D=169.7,
  chr2A=340.9, chr2B=348.9, chr2D=266.5,
  chr3A=318.8, chr3B=348.7, chr3D=240.5,
  chr4A=266.1, chr4B=318.8, chr4D=185.2,
  chr5A=253.0, chr5B=200.8, chr5D=187.6,
  chr6A=287.1, chr6B=324.7, chr6D=215.4,
  chr7A=361.9, chr7B=309.1, chr7D=338.2
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(RColorBrewer)
})

if (length(METHOD_TAGS) != length(METHOD_LABELS)) stop("METHOD_TAGS and METHOD_LABELS must have the same length.")
if (!all(METHOD_LABELS %in% names(METHOD_COLORS))) {
  miss <- setdiff(METHOD_LABELS, names(METHOD_COLORS))
  stop("METHOD_COLORS is missing names for: ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
}

POP_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2")
RUNS_DIR <- file.path(POP_DIR, "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed")

if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

read_tsv <- function(f) read.table(f, header=TRUE, sep="\t", quote="",
                                   comment.char="", stringsAsFactors=FALSE, check.names=FALSE)

save_plot <- function(p, out_path) {
  if (tolower(FILETYPE) == "png") {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, dpi = DPI, device = "png", limitsize = FALSE)
  } else {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, device = "pdf", limitsize = FALSE)
  }
}

chrom_to_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  ifelse(grepl("^chr", x, ignore.case=TRUE), x, paste0("chr", x))
}

# HELPER
get_il_universe <- function(method_tag) {
  bin_files <- list.files(
    RUNS_DIR,
    pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_bins_smooth__", method_tag, "\\.tsv$"),
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  bin_files <- bin_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", bin_files)]
  if (!length(bin_files)) stop("No bins_smooth files found for Pop", POP, " method_tag=", method_tag)

  accs <- character()
  for (f in bin_files) {
    df <- read_tsv(f)
    if (!"Acc" %in% names(df)) stop("Missing Acc in ", f)
    accs <- c(accs, as.character(df$Acc))
  }
  sort(unique(accs))
}

# HELPER: build population consensus segments
build_consensus_segments <- function(segs_all, ILs, bin_mb = 1, frac_il = 0.05) {
  if (!nrow(segs_all)) return(NULL)

  segs_all$Start <- as.integer(segs_all$Start)
  segs_all$End   <- as.integer(segs_all$End)
  segs_all$Chrom <- factor(chrom_to_chr(segs_all$Chrom), levels = CHRS)

  nIL <- length(ILs)
  if (nIL == 0) stop("IL universe is empty; cannot compute consensus.")
  bin_bp <- as.integer(bin_mb * 1e6)

  build_consensus_chr <- function(chr_df, chr_name) {
    if (!nrow(chr_df)) return(NULL)

    max_end <- max(chr_df$End, na.rm=TRUE)
    starts  <- seq.int(0L, max_end, by = bin_bp)
    ends    <- pmin(starts + bin_bp - 1L, max_end)
    nb      <- length(starts)
    cov     <- integer(nb)

    by_il <- split(chr_df, chr_df$Acc)

    for (acc in intersect(names(by_il), ILs)) {
      d <- by_il[[acc]]
      hit <- logical(nb)
      for (k in seq_len(nrow(d))) {
        s <- d$Start[k]; e <- d$End[k]
        i1 <- max(1L, floor(s / bin_bp) + 1L)
        i2 <- min(nb, floor(e / bin_bp) + 1L)
        if (i1 <= i2) hit[i1:i2] <- TRUE
      }
      cov[hit] <- cov[hit] + 1L
    }

    frac <- cov / nIL
    call <- frac >= frac_il
    if (!any(call)) return(NULL)

    # Compress contiguous called bins into consensus segments
    r <- rle(call)
    ends_r   <- cumsum(r$lengths)
    starts_r <- c(1, head(ends_r, -1) + 1)

    out <- list()
    for (j in seq_along(r$values)) {
      if (!r$values[j]) next
      i1 <- starts_r[j]; i2 <- ends_r[j]
      out[[length(out)+1L]] <- data.frame(
        Chrom  = chr_name,
        Start  = starts[i1],
        End    = ends[i2],
        FracIL = mean(frac[i1:i2], na.rm=TRUE),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    do.call(rbind, out)
  }

  pop_segs_list <- lapply(levels(segs_all$Chrom), function(ch) {
    dfc <- segs_all[segs_all$Chrom == ch & !is.na(segs_all$Chrom), , drop=FALSE]
    build_consensus_chr(dfc, ch)
  })
  out <- do.call(rbind, pop_segs_list)

  if (is.null(out) || !nrow(out)) return(NULL)
  out$Chrom <- factor(out$Chrom, levels = CHRS)
  out
}

# Backbone bins to force full chromosome x-span
BACKBONE_TAG <- METHOD_TAGS[1]

backbone_files <- list.files(
  RUNS_DIR,
  pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_bins_smooth__", BACKBONE_TAG, "\\.tsv$"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)
backbone_files <- backbone_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", backbone_files)]
if (!length(backbone_files)) stop("No backbone bins_smooth files found for Pop", POP, " tag=", BACKBONE_TAG)

backbone <- do.call(rbind, lapply(backbone_files, function(f) {
  df <- read_tsv(f)
  need <- c("Chrom","Start","End")
  miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
  if (length(miss)) stop("Backbone bins missing columns in ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
  df[, need]
}))

backbone$Chrom <- factor(chrom_to_chr(backbone$Chrom), levels = CHRS)
backbone$Start <- as.integer(backbone$Start)
backbone$End   <- as.integer(backbone$End)
backbone$xminMb <- backbone$Start / 1e6
backbone$xmaxMb <- backbone$End   / 1e6

# Load and compute consensus segments for each method
all_methods_segs <- list()

USE_METHOD_SPECIFIC_ILS <- FALSE
ILs_base <- get_il_universe(METHOD_TAGS[1])

for (i in seq_along(METHOD_TAGS)) {
  tag <- METHOD_TAGS[i]

  seg_files <- list.files(
    RUNS_DIR,
    pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_segments__", tag, "\\.tsv$"),
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  seg_files <- seg_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", seg_files)]

  if (!length(seg_files)) {
    message("[compare] No segment files found for method tag: ", tag, " -> skipping")
    next
  }

  segs_list <- lapply(seg_files, function(f) {
    df <- read_tsv(f)
    if (!nrow(df)) return(df)
    need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End")
    miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
    if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in segments file ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
    df
  })
  segs_all <- do.call(rbind, segs_list)

  # Determine WIL denominator
  ILs_use <- if (USE_METHOD_SPECIFIC_ILS) get_il_universe(tag) else ILs_base

  if (!nrow(segs_all)) {
    message("[compare] Method tag has segment files but zero rows: ", tag)
    next
  }

  cons <- build_consensus_segments(
    segs_all = segs_all,
    ILs      = ILs_use,
    bin_mb   = CONSENSUS_BIN_MB,
    frac_il  = CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL
  )

  if (is.null(cons) || !nrow(cons)) {
    message("[compare] No consensus segments passed threshold for method tag: ", tag)
    next
  }

  cons$MethodTag <- tag
  cons$MethodLbl <- METHOD_LABELS[i]
  all_methods_segs[[length(all_methods_segs)+1L]] <- cons
}

seg_df <- do.call(rbind, all_methods_segs)
if (is.null(seg_df) || !nrow(seg_df)) stop("No consensus segments to plot across methods.")

# Assign method lanes
method_levels <- METHOD_LABELS
seg_df$MethodLbl <- factor(seg_df$MethodLbl, levels = method_levels)
seg_df$lane <- as.numeric(seg_df$MethodLbl)
seg_df$ymin <- seg_df$lane - (LANE_HEIGHT / 2)
seg_df$ymax <- seg_df$lane + (LANE_HEIGHT / 2)

# Centromeres
cen_df <- data.frame(
  Chrom = factor(names(CEN_MB), levels = CHRS),
  CenMb = as.numeric(CEN_MB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Domestication loci
dom_df <- NULL
labs_df <- NULL
if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) {
  dom_df <- DOM_LOCI
  dom_df$Chrom <- factor(dom_df$Chrom, levels = CHRS)
  dom_df$MidMb <- (dom_df$StartMb + dom_df$EndMb) / 2

  # cap labels to full chromosome range using backbone, not segment range
  chr_maxMb <- aggregate(xmaxMb ~ Chrom, data = backbone, FUN = max)
  names(chr_maxMb)[2] <- "maxMb"

  labs_df <- merge(dom_df, chr_maxMb, by="Chrom", all.x=TRUE, sort=FALSE)
  labs_df$Xlab <- pmin(labs_df$EndMb + LABEL_OFFSET_MB, labs_df$maxMb - 1)
  labs_df$Ylab <- max(seg_df$lane) + 0.35
}

# -------------------- Plot --------------------
pal <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
col_cen  <- pal[7]
col_loci <- pal[7]

p <- ggplot() +
  # Invisible backbone rectangles: forces each facet to span full chromosome
  geom_rect(
    data = backbone,
    aes(xmin = xminMb, xmax = xmaxMb, ymin = 0, ymax = 1),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    alpha = 0, color = NA
  ) +
  # Domestication locus bands spanning all method lanes
  { if (!is.null(dom_df) && nrow(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_BANDS))
      geom_rect(
        data = dom_df,
        aes(xmin = StartMb, xmax = EndMb,
            ymin = 0.5, ymax = max(seg_df$lane) + 0.5),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        fill = col_loci, alpha = 0.12,
        color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.25
      ) else NULL } +
  # Consensus segment boxes in method lanes (colored by method)
  geom_rect(
    data = seg_df,
    aes(xmin = Start/1e6, xmax = End/1e6, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax, color = MethodLbl),
    fill = NA, linewidth = 0.85
  ) +
  # Optional locus midpoint ticks
  { if (!is.null(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_TICKS))
      geom_vline(
        data = dom_df,
        aes(xintercept = MidMb),
        color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
      ) else NULL } +
  # Centromeres
  geom_vline(
    data = cen_df,
    aes(xintercept = CenMb),
    color = col_cen, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  # Optional domestication locus labels
  { if (!is.null(labs_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_LABELS))
      geom_label(
        data = labs_df,
        aes(x = Xlab, y = Ylab, label = Name),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        size = 3,
        label.size = 0,
        fill = "white", alpha = 0.4,
        hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5
      ) else NULL } +
  facet_wrap(~ Chrom, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = function(lim) {
      seq(0, ceiling(lim[2] / X_TICK_MB) * X_TICK_MB, by = X_TICK_MB)
    }
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(method_levels),
    labels = method_levels,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.10))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = METHOD_COLORS, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Pop", POP, ": introgression segments across methods"),
    x = "Position (Mb)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

out_path <- file.path(
  OUT_DIR,
  paste0("Pop", POP, "_compareMethods_consensusSegments__",
         "bin", CONSENSUS_BIN_MB, "Mb_frac", CONSENSUS_FRAC_IL,
         "_backbone__", BACKBONE_TAG,
         if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) "_withDomLoci" else "",
         ".", ifelse(tolower(FILETYPE)=="png","png","pdf"))
)
save_plot(p, out_path)
message("[compare] wrote: ", out_path)

```

```{r}

################################################################
## Per-WIL plots - introgression segments and domestication loci
################################################################

# ================= EDIT THESE =================
ROOT_BYPOP <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation/filtered_parentHomPoly"
POP        <- 46 # population to plot
RUN_TAG    <- "runs_pedOnly_l1_smoothed"
METHOD_TAG <- "k10-5_k40-20_th10-0.9_th40-0.7"

OUT_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2", "plots_perIL", METHOD_TAG)
FILETYPE <- "png"
WIDTH    <- 14
HEIGHT   <- 8
DPI      <- 300

# Optional per-WIL segment overlay
ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY <- TRUE
SEG_YMIN             <- 0.00
SEG_YMAX             <- 1.00

# Optional domestication loci
ADD_DOM_LOCI      <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_LABELS  <- TRUE
SHOW_LOCI_BANDS   <- FALSE
SHOW_LOCI_TICKS   <- TRUE

DOM_LOCI <- data.frame(
  Chrom   = c("chr5A","chr3A","chr3B","chr2D", "chr2A", "chr2B"),
  StartMb = c(650,     65,      89,      21,     28,     38),
  EndMb   = c(651,     66,      90,      22,     35,     50),
  Name    = c("Q",     "BTR-A1","BTR-B1","Tg-D", "Tg-A", "Tg-B"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
LABEL_OFFSET_MB <- 0

CHRS <- c("chr1A","chr1B","chr1D",
          "chr2A","chr2B","chr2D",
          "chr3A","chr3B","chr3D",
          "chr4A","chr4B","chr4D",
          "chr5A","chr5B","chr5D",
          "chr6A","chr6B","chr6D",
          "chr7A","chr7B","chr7D")

CEN_MB <- c(
  chr1A=211.5, chr1B=241.7, chr1D=169.7,
  chr2A=340.9, chr2B=348.9, chr2D=266.5,
  chr3A=318.8, chr3B=348.7, chr3D=240.5,
  chr4A=266.1, chr4B=318.8, chr4D=185.2,
  chr5A=253.0, chr5B=200.8, chr5D=187.6,
  chr6A=287.1, chr6B=324.7, chr6D=215.4,
  chr7A=361.9, chr7B=309.1, chr7D=338.2
)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(RColorBrewer)
})

POP_DIR  <- file.path(ROOT_BYPOP, sprintf("Pop%d", POP), "AI2")
RUNS_DIR <- file.path(POP_DIR, RUN_TAG)

if (!dir.exists(OUT_DIR)) dir.create(OUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

read_tsv <- function(f) read.table(f, header=TRUE, sep="\t", quote="",
                                   comment.char="", stringsAsFactors=FALSE, check.names=FALSE)

save_plot <- function(p, out_path) {
  if (tolower(FILETYPE) == "png") {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, dpi = DPI, device = "png", limitsize = FALSE)
  } else {
    ggsave(out_path, p, width = WIDTH, height = HEIGHT, device = "pdf", limitsize = FALSE)
  }
}

chrom_to_chr <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  ifelse(grepl("^chr", x, ignore.case=TRUE), x, paste0("chr", x))
}

safe_filename <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("[[:space:]]+", "_", x)
  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_\\-\\.]+", "_", x)
}

# Collect bins_smooth
bin_files <- list.files(
  RUNS_DIR,
  pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_bins_smooth__", METHOD_TAG, "\\.tsv$"),
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)
bin_files <- bin_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", bin_files)]
if (!length(bin_files)) stop("No bins_smooth files found for Pop", POP, " tag=", METHOD_TAG)

bins_list <- lapply(bin_files, function(f) {
  df <- read_tsv(f)
  need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End","WE_prop","Sites")
  miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
  if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
  df
})
bins_all <- do.call(rbind, bins_list)

bins_all$Start    <- as.integer(bins_all$Start)
bins_all$End      <- as.integer(bins_all$End)
bins_all$Sites    <- as.integer(bins_all$Sites)
bins_all$WE_prop  <- pmin(1, pmax(0, as.numeric(bins_all$WE_prop)))
bins_all$Chrom    <- factor(chrom_to_chr(bins_all$Chrom), levels = CHRS)
bins_all$CenterMb <- ((bins_all$Start + bins_all$End) / 2) / 1e6

max_sites <- suppressWarnings(max(bins_all$Sites, na.rm = TRUE))
if (!is.finite(max_sites) || max_sites <= 0) max_sites <- 1
bins_all$alpha_sites <- 0.25 + 0.75 * (pmin(bins_all$Sites, max_sites) / max_sites)

ILs <- sort(unique(bins_all$Acc))
if (!length(ILs)) stop("No ILs (Acc) found in bins_smooth files for Pop", POP)

# Optional: overlay per-WIL called introgression segments
segs_all <- NULL
if (isTRUE(ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY)) {
  seg_files <- list.files(
    RUNS_DIR,
    pattern = paste0("^Pop", POP, "_chr[1-7][ABD]_segments__", METHOD_TAG, "\\.tsv$"),
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
  seg_files <- seg_files[grepl("/chr[1-7][ABD]/", seg_files)]

  if (!length(seg_files)) {
    message("[segments overlay] No segment files found -> overlay skipped.")
  } else {
    segs_list <- lapply(seg_files, function(f) {
      df <- read_tsv(f)
      if (!nrow(df)) return(df)
      need <- c("Acc","Chrom","Start","End")
      miss <- setdiff(need, names(df))
      if (length(miss)) stop("Missing columns in segments file ", f, ": ", paste(miss, collapse=", "))
      df
    })
    segs_all <- do.call(rbind, segs_list)
    if (nrow(segs_all)) {
      segs_all$Start <- as.integer(segs_all$Start)
      segs_all$End   <- as.integer(segs_all$End)
      segs_all$Chrom <- factor(chrom_to_chr(segs_all$Chrom), levels = CHRS)
    } else {
      segs_all <- NULL
      message("[segments overlay] Segment files exist but contain zero rows.")
    }
  }
}

# Centromeres
cen_df <- data.frame(
  Chrom = factor(names(CEN_MB), levels = CHRS),
  CenMb = as.numeric(CEN_MB),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Domestication loci
dom_df <- NULL
labs_df <- NULL
if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) {
  dom_df <- DOM_LOCI
  dom_df$Chrom <- factor(dom_df$Chrom, levels = CHRS)
  dom_df$MidMb <- (dom_df$StartMb + dom_df$EndMb) / 2
  labs_df <- dom_df
  labs_df$Xlab <- labs_df$EndMb + LABEL_OFFSET_MB
  labs_df$Ylab <- 0.98
}

pal <- brewer.pal(8, "Dark2")
col_cen  <- pal[4]
col_seg  <- pal[1]
col_loci <- pal[4]

message("[per-IL plots] Pop", POP, " IL count: ", length(ILs))

# One plot per WIL
for (acc in ILs) {

  d <- bins_all[bins_all$Acc == acc & !is.na(bins_all$Chrom), , drop=FALSE]
  if (!nrow(d)) next

  seg_df <- NULL
  if (!is.null(segs_all) && nrow(segs_all)) {
    seg_df <- segs_all[segs_all$Acc == acc & !is.na(segs_all$Chrom), , drop=FALSE]
    if (nrow(seg_df)) {
      seg_df$ymin <- SEG_YMIN
      seg_df$ymax <- SEG_YMAX
    } else {
      seg_df <- NULL
    }
  }

  p <- ggplot() +
    (if (!is.null(dom_df) && nrow(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_BANDS))
       geom_rect(
         data = dom_df,
         aes(xmin = StartMb, xmax = EndMb, ymin = 0, ymax = 1),
         inherit.aes = FALSE,
         fill = col_loci, alpha = 0.10,
         color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.25
       ) else NULL) +
    geom_rect(
      data = d,
      aes(xmin = Start/1e6, xmax = End/1e6, ymin = 0, ymax = 1,
          fill = WE_prop, alpha = alpha_sites),
      color = NA
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = d[order(d$Chrom, d$CenterMb), , drop=FALSE],
      aes(x = CenterMb, y = WE_prop),
      size = 1.4, stroke = 0, color = "black", alpha = 0.95
    ) +
    (if (!is.null(seg_df) && nrow(seg_df))
       geom_rect(
         data = seg_df,
         aes(xmin = Start/1e6, xmax = End/1e6, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
         inherit.aes = FALSE,
         fill = NA, color = col_seg, linewidth = 0.7
       ) else NULL) +
    (if (!is.null(dom_df) && nrow(dom_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_TICKS))
       geom_vline(
         data = dom_df,
         aes(xintercept = MidMb),
         color = col_loci, linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
       ) else NULL) +
    (if (!is.null(labs_df) && nrow(labs_df) && isTRUE(SHOW_LOCI_LABELS))
       geom_label(
         data = labs_df,
         aes(x = Xlab, y = Ylab, label = Name),
         inherit.aes = FALSE,
         size = 3,
         label.size = 0,
         fill = "white", alpha = 0.5,
         hjust = 0, vjust = 1
       ) else NULL) +
    geom_vline(
      data = cen_df,
      aes(xintercept = CenMb),
      color = col_cen, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~ Chrom, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      name   = "Donor proportion",
      limits = c(0, 1),
      low    = "white",
      high   = "#7570b3",
      na.value = "grey90"
    ) +
    guides(alpha = "none") +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Pop", POP, " - ", acc, " donor proportion"),
      x = "Position (Mb)",
      y = "Donor proportion"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", colour = NA),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )

  out_path <- file.path(
    OUT_DIR,
    paste0(
      "Pop", POP, "_IL_", safe_filename(acc), "_", METHOD_TAG,
      if (isTRUE(ADD_SEGMENTS_OVERLAY)) "_withILsegments" else "",
      if (isTRUE(ADD_DOM_LOCI)) "_withDomLoci" else "",
      ".", ifelse(tolower(FILETYPE)=="png","png","pdf")
    )
  )

  save_plot(p, out_path)
}

message("[per-IL plots] wrote to: ", OUT_DIR)

```
